subject: WE DID IT...
body:
| | | | [ ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c97687793c&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | | Dear Friends -

**Democracy is winning!** And I couldn't be more excited or more hopeful. People are literally dancing in the streets. Music is pouring out of the souls who longed for such a day. Communities that felt it was unsafe to be seen in the light are now coming out of the shadows. Democrats have pulled off a feat that has only happened four times before in the last century — we defeated an incumbent president.

Democrats won the highest office in the land because of the work that has been done since the day Trump was inaugurated. The Resistance only gained momentum, culminating at the ballot box in 2020. I am proud to have been there with you fighting the good fight! It was the movement that has allowed us to celebrate a President-elect Biden and Vice President-elect Harris.

I am also proud of the work that the DNC has done to rebuild our party since 2016. Under the leadership of Chair Tom Perez, the DNC built the most robust infrastructure for a non-incumbent candidate to get Democrats elected up and down the ballot; overhauled the technology infrastructure of the Democratic Party by creating a state-of-the-art data warehouse; significantly expanded the quality and quantity of voter data; created a rapid-response operation with the DNC War Room; built a team that worked aggressively to combat disinformation; focused on building an organizing pipeline in battleground states; and made the earliest investments to date in voter protection. The goals were clear: create multiple paths to victory for our Democratic nominee and invest all across this country, up and down the ballot.

**The path to victory does not stop with the White House.** Our attention must now turn to taking back the Senate. The two runoffs in the state of Georgia are our chance to make that happen. Georgia has shown us that there is a path, we just have to be relentless in the pursuit. I know that folks have lots of questions about how to help in Georgia.

The DSCC will play a pivotal role in Democrats’ GOTV programs in Georgia and **they need your help** to maximize their efforts. The top needs as shared by their Political Director, Jessica Knight Henry are the following:
* Calling All Virtual Volunteers to Help Flip Georgia - [Virtual Volunteers](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f5e53984ea&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Come to Georgia to Help Flip the Senate - [On The Ground Volunteers](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=620ae1573a&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

Another critical way to make a contribution is to make a contribution.

**Please share widely with all of your networks:**
* Raphael Warnock Senate Campaign
* [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wfg_ff_lgw](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=47dc475e42&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Jon Ossoff Senate Campaign
* [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tjorunoffabrams](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5aced8729b&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

Finally, I’ve also included an update below from Jessica on the DSCC plans for Georgia and they’ll be sharing daily updates.

My sleeves are still rolled up and ready to dig into the work that is ahead of us. I know as we take in this incredible moment, you will join me in that pursuit. I’m excited to dig in one more time with you for this critical win.

Warmly,
Mũthoni

| DSCC Memo on GA Senate Races
TO: Interested Parties
FROM: Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
DATE: November 9, 2020
MEMO: Ossoff, Warnock Well-Positioned to Win Competitive Georgia Runoffs _______________________________________________________________ In less than two months, Georgians will return to the polls for two highly competitive runoffs to elect new leaders to the U.S. Senate who will break through the Washington infighting to pass coronavirus relief and protect health care for Georgia families.

Tuesday’s results confirmed Georgia is a battleground with President-Elect Joe Biden poised to carry the state and improved Democratic performance across key counties from 2016 to 2020. The surest sign these seats are in play is the amount of money Republicans are prepared to spend to prop up weak incumbents. Jon Ossoff and Reverend Raphael Warnock each begin their respective races in a strong position with momentum on their side and a path to victory on January 5, 2020. **BATTLEGROUND GEORGIA ** As of Sunday, November 8, President-Elect Biden held a 10,000-vote lead over soon-to-be-former President Trump. He will be the first Democrat to win the state since 1992, and that success continues the trend toward Democratic candidates. As published last year from a report from Stacey Abrams’ organization [Fair Fight noted](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=caa73a3944&e=d6c5c7d7ec): in 2008, President Obama lost by an 8-point deficit; in 2014, Senate candidate Michelle Nunn lost by a 7.8-point deficit; that fell to a 5.1-point deficit for former Secretary Clinton in 2016, and then shrank to a 1.4-point deficit for Abrams in 2018.

These gains were observed down-ballot, too: last week, Democrats flipped Georgia’s 7th District - one of three red-to-blue swings nationwide. And, despite facing well-financed incumbents who started with massive cash on hand advantages, both Ossoff and Warnock forced runoffs in their races.

Three key dynamics have moved Georgia firmly into battleground status, starting with the growth of the Atlanta suburbs. A close look at the Atlanta Metro Area shows the improvement in Democratic performance from as recently as 2016: | **GA
County ** | ** Clinton Margin
2016** | ** Biden Margin
2020**
---|---|---
Cobb | +2 | +14
DeKalb | +66 | +67
Douglas | +11 | +25
Gwinnett | +6 | +18
An analysis from the [New York Times](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a33102ca31&e=d6c5c7d7ec) noted that in addition to gains in the Atlanta region, Biden and Democrats “added to [Clinton’s] margin in the state, especially in the counties that are home to Georgia’s most important second-tier cities — Augusta, Columbus, Macon, Savannah and Athens.”

Another critical factor is the massive investment and new programming led by a consortium of organizations to register new voters: more than [800,000 Georgians](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=eeb8487440&e=d6c5c7d7ec) registered to vote after 2018.

>From the [Washington Post](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=80319eec1a&e=d6c5c7d7ec):
"In 2016, 22 percent of Georgia’s eligible voters were not registered. This year, that figure stood at 2 percent. Turnout, meanwhile, jumped to more than 67 percent of eligible voters, breaking the state’s 40-year record of 63 percent, set in 2008."

The push to register more voters was matched by efforts to ensure they turn out and that their vote counted. In addition to the voter registration work, Fair Fight also vigorously fought against voter suppression efforts and to protect voting rights across the country and especially in Georgia. In this election, a historic 3.8 million Georgians cast their ballots in the early vote alone. The results show how Georgia has become a battleground where Democrats can compete and win.

**THE CASE AGAINST KELLY LOEFFLER**

An unelected Senator, Kelly Loeffler enters the runoff in a weak position after a scandal-plagued year and her brutal fight with Congressman Doug Collins. She’s failed to adequately answer for her [stock-trading scandal](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=daaa332650&e=d6c5c7d7ec). After a Senators-only private briefing on COVID-19, Loeffler and her husband sold $3 million in stock holdings, and her husband bought stock in a company that makes PPE and in a teleworking company -- even though she continued to downplay the threat of coronavirus. Now, her favorability is underwater and she has a double-digit deficit with independent voters. Even Republicans have worried about her campaign and said earlier this year that she should drop out of the race for the good of her party.

Reverend Raphael Warnock finished in first place in the special election. He grew up in public housing in Savannah and was the first person in his family to graduate from college, and now serves as Senior Pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church in Atlanta, the former pulpit of Martin Luther King. Reverend Warnock believes his service does not stop at the church door and has been a vocal advocate for the dignity of working people, expanding Medicaid, and restoring voting rights.

Loeffler and her allies - including a super PAC funded by her husband - spent [$31 million](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3a02cfcd6a&e=d6c5c7d7ec) this year for a lackluster second-place finish. Now, Republican operatives are planning to spend upwards of [$100 million](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=385d576536&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to falsely attack Reverend Warnock and distract from any continued scrutiny of how Senator Loeffler has looked out for herself, her corporate allies, and wealthy associates - not Georgians.

**THE CASE AGAINST DAVID PERDUE**

Senator David Perdue doesn’t deserve to be re-elected. He has opposed economic relief for workers, secretly [profited from heavy stock trading](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=62a5b34e32&e=d6c5c7d7ec) as the outbreak spread across Georgia, and has supported taking away protections for people with pre-existing conditions, even in the middle of this pandemic. He spent the last six years in Washington hiding from his constituents and avoiding the press, refusing to hold a single public town hall in his entire term. He ended his general election campaign ducking a debate to avoid being held accountable. He hasn’t been [seen or heard](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c50d1f7f1c&e=d6c5c7d7ec) from since he was forced into the runoff.

Jon Ossoff, who was mentored by Congressman John Lewis, runs a business that investigates corruption, organized crime, and war crimes for international news organizations. Jon’s wife Alisha is an OBGYN doctor who has been on the front lines of this pandemic and contracted COVID-19 earlier this year while caring for patients in Georgia. So Jon understands it is vital to ensure every American can afford the care they need — and the importance of listening to medical experts, especially in a public health emergency.

Jon will defend the protections for pre-existing conditions we fought so hard for in the Affordable Care Act. And because he fights corruption for a living, we know he will stand up to insurance and drug companies to ensure health care is affordable for everyone.

Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC spent more money attacking Jon than nearly any other Democratic Senate challenger this year, a sign of how nervous Washington Republicans were about losing this seat in a highly competitive runoff.

**HISTORIC DSCC INVESTMENT TO CONTINUE IN RUNOFFS**

The DSCC spent more than $5.5 million this cycle supporting the Ossoff and Warnock campaigns to help force these runoffs, including a $1.8 million mail program and $400,000 on phone calls to reach Georgia voters. The DSCC invested more than $1 million in the Democratic Party of Georgia to support field organizing and other staff, $1.5 million in coordinated funds for Ossoff, and nearly $900,000 for Warnock to bolster paid media going into Election Day.

These historic investments will continue in the runoffs: the DSCC will commit to a multimillion field effort to register Georgians for the January 5th runoffs and turn out voters. The program will include on-the-ground organizers, direct mail, phones, and text messaging as well as digital mobilization efforts.

**###**

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friends - Democracy is winning! And I couldn't be more excited or more hopeful. People are literally dancing in the streets. Music is pouring out of the souls who longed for such a day. Communities that felt it was unsafe to be seen in the light are now coming out of the shadows. Democrats have pulled off a feat that has only happened four times before in the last century — we defeated an incumbent president. Democrats won the highest office in the land because of the work that has been done since the day Trump was inaugurated. The Resistance only gained momentum, culminating at the ballot box in 2020. I am proud to have been there with you fighting the good fight! It was the movement that has allowed us to celebrate a President-elect Biden and Vice President-elect Harris. I am also proud of the work that the DNC has done to rebuild our party since 2016. Under the leadership of Chair Tom Perez, the DNC built the most robust infrastructure for a non-incumbent candidate to get Democrats elected up and down the ballot; overhauled the technology infrastructure of the Democratic Party by creating a state-of-the-art data warehouse; significantly expanded the quality and quantity of voter data; created a rapid-response operation with the DNC War Room; built a team that worked aggressively to combat disinformation; focused on building an organizing pipeline in battleground states; and made the earliest investments to date in voter protection. The goals were clear: create multiple paths to victory for our Democratic nominee and invest all across this country, up and down the ballot. The path to victory does not stop with the White House. Our attention must now turn to taking back the Senate. The two runoffs in the state of Georgia are our chance to make that happen. Georgia has shown us that there is a path, we just have to be relentless in the pursuit. I know that folks have lots of questions about how to help in Georgia. The DSCC will play a pivotal role in Democrats’ GOTV programs in Georgia and they need your help to maximize their efforts. The top needs as shared by their Political Director, Jessica Knight Henry are the following: Calling All Virtual Volunteers to Help Flip Georgia - Come to Georgia to Help Flip the Senate - Another critical way to make a contribution is to make a contribution. Please share widely with all of your networks: Raphael Warnock Senate Campaign Jon Ossoff Senate Campaign Finally, I’ve also included an update below from Jessica on the DSCC plans for Georgia and they’ll be sharing daily updates. My sleeves are still rolled up and ready to dig into the work that is ahead of us. I know as we take in this incredible moment, you will join me in that pursuit. I’m excited to dig in one more time with you for this critical win. Warmly, Mũthoni | | | DSCC Memo on GA Senate Races TO: Interested Parties FROM: Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee DATE: November 9, 2020 MEMO: Ossoff, Warnock Well-Positioned to Win Competitive Georgia Runoffs _______________________________________________________________ In less than two months, Georgians will return to the polls for two highly competitive runoffs to elect new leaders to the U.S. Senate who will break through the Washington infighting to pass coronavirus relief and protect health care for Georgia families. Tuesday’s results confirmed Georgia is a battleground with President-Elect Joe Biden poised to carry the state and improved Democratic performance across key counties from 2016 to 2020. The surest sign these seats are in play is the amount of money Republicans are prepared to spend to prop up weak incumbents. Jon Ossoff and Reverend Raphael Warnock each begin their respective races in a strong position with momentum on their side and a path to victory on January 5, 2020. BATTLEGROUND GEORGIA As of Sunday, November 8, President-Elect Biden held a 10,000-vote lead over soon-to-be-former President Trump. He will be the first Democrat to win the state since 1992, and that success continues the trend toward Democratic candidates. As published last year from a report from Stacey Abrams’ organization : in 2008, President Obama lost by an 8-point deficit; in 2014, Senate candidate Michelle Nunn lost by a 7.8-point deficit; that fell to a 5.1-point deficit for former Secretary Clinton in 2016, and then shrank to a 1.4-point deficit for Abrams in 2018. These gains were observed down-ballot, too: last week, Democrats flipped Georgia’s 7th District - one of three red-to-blue swings nationwide. And, despite facing well-financed incumbents who started with massive cash on hand advantages, both Ossoff and Warnock forced runoffs in their races. Three key dynamics have moved Georgia firmly into battleground status, starting with the growth of the Atlanta suburbs. A close look at the Atlanta Metro Area shows the improvement in Democratic performance from as recently as 2016: | GA County | Clinton Margin 2016 | Biden Margin 2020 ---|---|--- Cobb | +2 | +14 DeKalb | +66 | +67 Douglas | +11 | +25 Gwinnett | +6 | +18 An analysis from the noted that in addition to gains in the Atlanta region, Biden and Democrats “added to [Clinton’s] margin in the state, especially in the counties that are home to Georgia’s most important second-tier cities — Augusta, Columbus, Macon, Savannah and Athens.” Another critical factor is the massive investment and new programming led by a consortium of organizations to register new voters: more than registered to vote after 2018. From the : "In 2016, 22 percent of Georgia’s eligible voters were not registered. This year, that figure stood at 2 percent. Turnout, meanwhile, jumped to more than 67 percent of eligible voters, breaking the state’s 40-year record of 63 percent, set in 2008." The push to register more voters was matched by efforts to ensure they turn out and that their vote counted. In addition to the voter registration work, Fair Fight also vigorously fought against voter suppression efforts and to protect voting rights across the country and especially in Georgia. In this election, a historic 3.8 million Georgians cast their ballots in the early vote alone. The results show how Georgia has become a battleground where Democrats can compete and win. THE CASE AGAINST KELLY LOEFFLER An unelected Senator, Kelly Loeffler enters the runoff in a weak position after a scandal-plagued year and her brutal fight with Congressman Doug Collins. She’s failed to adequately answer for her . After a Senators-only private briefing on COVID-19, Loeffler and her husband sold $3 million in stock holdings, and her husband bought stock in a company that makes PPE and in a teleworking company -- even though she continued to downplay the threat of coronavirus. Now, her favorability is underwater and she has a double-digit deficit with independent voters. Even Republicans have worried about her campaign and said earlier this year that she should drop out of the race for the good of her party. Reverend Raphael Warnock finished in first place in the special election. He grew up in public housing in Savannah and was the first person in his family to graduate from college, and now serves as Senior Pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church in Atlanta, the former pulpit of Martin Luther King. Reverend Warnock believes his service does not stop at the church door and has been a vocal advocate for the dignity of working people, expanding Medicaid, and restoring voting rights. Loeffler and her allies - including a super PAC funded by her husband - spent this year for a lackluster second-place finish. Now, Republican operatives are planning to spend upwards of to falsely attack Reverend Warnock and distract from any continued scrutiny of how Senator Loeffler has looked out for herself, her corporate allies, and wealthy associates - not Georgians. THE CASE AGAINST DAVID PERDUE Senator David Perdue doesn’t deserve to be re-elected. He has opposed economic relief for workers, secretly as the outbreak spread across Georgia, and has supported taking away protections for people with pre-existing conditions, even in the middle of this pandemic. He spent the last six years in Washington hiding from his constituents and avoiding the press, refusing to hold a single public town hall in his entire term. He ended his general election campaign ducking a debate to avoid being held accountable. He hasn’t been from since he was forced into the runoff. Jon Ossoff, who was mentored by Congressman John Lewis, runs a business that investigates corruption, organized crime, and war crimes for international news organizations. Jon’s wife Alisha is an OBGYN doctor who has been on the front lines of this pandemic and contracted COVID-19 earlier this year while caring for patients in Georgia. So Jon understands it is vital to ensure every American can afford the care they need — and the importance of listening to medical experts, especially in a public health emergency. Jon will defend the protections for pre-existing conditions we fought so hard for in the Affordable Care Act. And because he fights corruption for a living, we know he will stand up to insurance and drug companies to ensure health care is affordable for everyone. Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC spent more money attacking Jon than nearly any other Democratic Senate challenger this year, a sign of how nervous Washington Republicans were about losing this seat in a highly competitive runoff. HISTORIC DSCC INVESTMENT TO CONTINUE IN RUNOFFS The DSCC spent more than $5.5 million this cycle supporting the Ossoff and Warnock campaigns to help force these runoffs, including a $1.8 million mail program and $400,000 on phone calls to reach Georgia voters. The DSCC invested more than $1 million in the Democratic Party of Georgia to support field organizing and other staff, $1.5 million in coordinated funds for Ossoff, and nearly $900,000 for Warnock to bolster paid media going into Election Day. These historic investments will continue in the runoffs: the DSCC will commit to a multimillion field effort to register Georgians for the January 5th runoffs and turn out voters. The program will include on-the-ground organizers, direct mail, phones, and text messaging as well as digital mobilization efforts. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com DNC Community Engagement 430 S Capitol Street, SE Washington, DC 20003 * USA

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jerry?=
subject: My Statement on the Presidential Race being "called."
body:
My Statement on the Presidential Race being "called." | | | |
---
| My statement on the Presidential Race being "called."
---
| | |
---
| **I mentioned on November 5th that I believe that the American people deserve transparency, honesty, and an accurate counting of votes in this and every election. Every vote legally cast must be counted, and every illegal vote must be thrown out. I believe in equal justice under the law, and this is what Americans deserve. Period. ** **As of today, there is legitimate evidence of voter irregularities and fraud that taints our understanding of the outcome of this election. Dead people have “voted” in more than one city, Republican poll watchers were not allowed into Philadelphia polling locations even though they had a court order to do so, USPS workers stated plainly that they were instructed to back date ballots, there was the interesting anomaly of large amounts of votes with only a vote for Joe Biden but no other vote for a down-ticket race, unexplained glitches happening in voting software, and more... ** ******Voter f** raud is historically common. Based on current evidence, this election is no different, and it is poorly researched and simply naive to believe otherwise. **It would not be honoring to all of the Americans that legally cast their vote if President Trump were to concede without proper recounts and proper litigation to verify that all legal votes were counted, and all illegally cast votes are thrown out. This election is not over, and Joe Biden is not the current President-elect. This election will not be over until proper recounts, state certification, proper litigation, and court rulings are finalized.** **Therefore, my wife Lisa and I fully stand with & support President Donald Trump as he pursues lawful recounts, and litigation in court to ensure the fairness, legality, and legitimacy of this election.** **Please join with me in prayer to pray for integrity in this election, for an exposing of any & all corruption or fraud, and for an accurate counting of all legal votes until this election is fully and completely resolved. ** **Let’s pray!** **God bless you, & God bless America. **

**#BeBold
-Jerry Evans**

**_Please check out my [website](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=635a44ce50&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and [my vision](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=fd52cd3e70&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey._**

| Recount Update - Day 1
---

| Friends, As you know, Senate Democrats are working overtime to try and overturn the results of last week's elections by forcing THREE recounts in races that newly elected Republican Senators won by significant margins. Well some good news! Today in the first of the three recounts, **Republican Senator Gary Daniels of Milford was triumphant in his recount! ** This is a great start, but we still need your help to cover the expenses of the recount. [If you are able, please consider making a small contribution to our Recount Defense Fund online by following this secure link. ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTUxMDIxNDY3MTMzNTQ3Nzg4JmM9ZDNvMyZlPTE5MjgmYj00NTA0OTQ2NjAmZD11NnQ0Yzhz.-7lFV4BA75V0EYacOwLF-U50IPqXpTll9QZQVazg3KQ) Thank you for all of your support during these important few days. We will come out of this victorious and ensure that our elections remain fair and accurate. Thanks, The New Hampshire Senate Republicans P. S. Remember what we’re fighting for: no income tax, no sales tax, no capital gains tax!

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: RAPHAEL WARNOCK EMBRACED FIDEL CASTRO, HOSTED HIM AT “LOVEFEST” IN NYC CHURCH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 10, 2020
RAPHAEL WARNOCK EMBRACED FIDEL CASTRO, HOSTED HIM AT "LOVEFEST" IN NYC CHURCH
ATLANTA - Raphael Warnock has spent decades embracing radical, far-left, anti-American people and policies. One of the most shocking examples came in 1995, when as a pastor at Abyssinian Baptist Church in Harlem, Warnock warmly [welcomed](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H_J5zjU_yJCaIfuRd7Ps2QszEADJw2PAyUWvtFvPP8igwN-KTI1xNezwKaa62pZP623t4Me6LqX4sXgkSXT-uJniupGyI3DfxQ22bQ6jZ_-xWfyDhODPuWw8ofUjT5awjsAeAgqtBpcbr-HApmyLVtXlWOPO7sBpll5GKm8rsdgaw1A2FcgJ2qALarj9F_9aua05YD_phlk=&c=v3fZI1VsVo-pt34InnyKPAHiCjp_1lyEvpQ-pG0CartQgvYnTFZsqw==&ch=bzcHyhL814cYF5YXdE3obrz_EZ0M8CYeENG_dZhfnfl4srF6iLXEZg==) Fidel Castro to his church for a "lovefest" in Castro's honor. Fidel Castro, the brutal Communist Dictator of Cuba responsible for the mass genocide of thousands of his people, received the red-carpet treatment from Warnock's church - all while Warnock was a pastor there.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H_J5zjU_yJCaIfuRd7Ps2QszEADJw2PAyUWvtFvPP8igwN-KTI1xNezwKaa62pZPj0yIQ7JOHSfheWhhsJX1xllwx2dXA7ycwH5Yp9vMWvRkVrV9cUiN6KvirN_Gq-1481stFKwUInpBzGAc_crOgfjw-3ByHoFYuzyGlXvvoRX4ma4HV7G55_i5X2LV795e6zeihjTEFi0=&c=v3fZI1VsVo-pt34InnyKPAHiCjp_1lyEvpQ-pG0CartQgvYnTFZsqw==&ch=bzcHyhL814cYF5YXdE3obrz_EZ0M8CYeENG_dZhfnfl4srF6iLXEZg==)
---
| "Raphael Warnock celebrating Fidel Castro and welcoming him to his church is just the latest example in a long line of his radical, far-left, socialist positions," said Communications Director Stephen Lawson. "Georgians need someone like Kelly Loeffler who has a record of results creating jobs and opportunities for hardworking families - not a radical socialist who cozies up to brutal dictators."
This jarring embrace of the far-left and its dangerous agenda is just the latest example of Warnock's radical ideology. He [defended](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H_J5zjU_yJCaIfuRd7Ps2QszEADJw2PAyUWvtFvPP8igwN-KTI1xNezwKaa62pZPLIj5_HCsUke7eSb6UnnsLwZPhdREJHyKuS-0vd7FZVz6sIgtpDp0x2QboxQtWZKZTrmAfGoIdqNm5ToQeUO4UHLqwUMxPoX2wka7HxBtGGh-YvvhcFeuWx8HI7MuMCBQhnlprVmf8cgYcYrtbPj8nl4PWkbyo4Un6ECBgGEIUSvpRgHpojrw0g==&c=v3fZI1VsVo-pt34InnyKPAHiCjp_1lyEvpQ-pG0CartQgvYnTFZsqw==&ch=bzcHyhL814cYF5YXdE3obrz_EZ0M8CYeENG_dZhfnfl4srF6iLXEZg==) Jeremiah Wright's "God Damn America" Sermon, even calling Wright a "prophet." Warnock [called](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H_J5zjU_yJCaIfuRd7Ps2QszEADJw2PAyUWvtFvPP8igwN-KTI1xNUARisIbljyL3FAglA9qZ7VaxTbrvo8zhLlANgs1B3X-AF4ml8XmcmUsRySh--jiC6KHOX2907N3f7xj2VyJUQKwY5YfayOEv_vIhZt7NgEtDn86mtWixs9HO2ifyY-ew7BuFAGmIA9uS_eNFMzz0ILHp1lPmrOQQQ==&c=v3fZI1VsVo-pt34InnyKPAHiCjp_1lyEvpQ-pG0CartQgvYnTFZsqw==&ch=bzcHyhL814cYF5YXdE3obrz_EZ0M8CYeENG_dZhfnfl4srF6iLXEZg==) police officers "gangsters," "thugs," and "bullies," and he opposes the death penalty in all cases - even for convicted cop-killers - [calling](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H_J5zjU_yJCaIfuRd7Ps2QszEADJw2PAyUWvtFvPP8igwN-KTI1xNezwKaa62pZPechOKDgieXyctDtXREdUREsk27kf3BTZTdWfOwf7GROGof3WCsZC9NYCqHRJHJ7Wsta1_bYTA0_aHCmvlB0Tq2bAAL3OS8SsAB4dFDhwcJVvSivHshOqbtNvy3S8k9N0FJZDTfdCiKV-4wnf3CEqZsfMYSCxZfJJ4FE2JJUY_f85zwV2u7GPdtjadI2eyipHPpQL-1gqmuzGVPOzrRClcA==&c=v3fZI1VsVo-pt34InnyKPAHiCjp_1lyEvpQ-pG0CartQgvYnTFZsqw==&ch=bzcHyhL814cYF5YXdE3obrz_EZ0M8CYeENG_dZhfnfl4srF6iLXEZg==) it the "final failsafe of white supremacy." He even [likened](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H_J5zjU_yJCaIfuRd7Ps2QszEADJw2PAyUWvtFvPP8igwN-KTI1xNXCZ2cxGNg7roUaJikNL0YhQsCRpeB5sDw5RkDGUIhxNFOjITs-1f-rz4YhGLZ3tsVA7u42mFuuDMDZ_3CIle7EaFOgaHD76P-8CaBZQodh1zWiUo2Mq9PgMdp_rrQUvfjawL8WJNvfL3AkngaDUQJo=&c=v3fZI1VsVo-pt34InnyKPAHiCjp_1lyEvpQ-pG0CartQgvYnTFZsqw==&ch=bzcHyhL814cYF5YXdE3obrz_EZ0M8CYeENG_dZhfnfl4srF6iLXEZg==) Israel to an "oppressive regime," comparing it to "apartheid South Africa." It's obvious: Raphael Warnock is too radical for Georgia. BACKGROUND
Raphael Warnock Was a "Youth Pastor" and "Assistant Pastor" at Abyssinian Baptist Church in Harlem, New York City from 1991 to 2001. "During the 1992 Democratic Convention in New York City, he coordinated, under the auspices of Clergy and Laity Concerned (CALC) and the Abyssinian Church, an alternative People's Convention, in memory of Fannie Lou Hamer, the Mississippi sharecropper who told the nation in 1968 she was 'sick and tired of being sick and tired.'" (Press Kit, [Web Archive](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H_J5zjU_yJCaIfuRd7Ps2QszEADJw2PAyUWvtFvPP8igwN-KTI1xNezwKaa62pZPl1bwD3q0OiTU7HvDJQLkAPxpTaM04blwruf-8oIse8FqlHxcpiJKhCYO92aaIJCRnZN8sa1ZTXTjrsA3TkU1PqGgiF-n4X3JkYT9RAkgWqjLeE7pxKLQs30sp-pmpaXDHZjrwIeB-b5SYnNuQ4__J_6XFru528RXL3wVSmvWGtCy_85K-jiZUw==&c=v3fZI1VsVo-pt34InnyKPAHiCjp_1lyEvpQ-pG0CartQgvYnTFZsqw==&ch=bzcHyhL814cYF5YXdE3obrz_EZ0M8CYeENG_dZhfnfl4srF6iLXEZg==), Ebenezer Baptist Church)
Raphael Warnock was identified as a pastor at Abyssinian Baptist Church in Harlem, New York. In 1997, the New York Times identified Warnock as "The Rev. Raphael Warnock, assistant pastor at Abyssinian, one of Harlem's leading churches." ("2 Well-Known Churches Say No to Workfare Jobs," [New York Times](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H_J5zjU_yJCaIfuRd7Ps2QszEADJw2PAyUWvtFvPP8igwN-KTI1xNezwKaa62pZP9gdIvLhLqIQE-TIFKXfQf_RXpoDj3ymEl9ta1w6ZS-1EetUkJAmGRpXx9R9JBOAJUysDIpB5QoIVx-Yh-HWLmvyGPLJ2H7fcod2c1tomwGidWYGcThIWoJ73QBfwimrrooYOfg-pII2olsH5_lKB545aTBCpcHSUl84qdt7gUw8qUShvXKYUyA==&c=v3fZI1VsVo-pt34InnyKPAHiCjp_1lyEvpQ-pG0CartQgvYnTFZsqw==&ch=bzcHyhL814cYF5YXdE3obrz_EZ0M8CYeENG_dZhfnfl4srF6iLXEZg==), August 4, 1997)
In 1995, Abyssinian Baptist Church--where Warnock was a Pastor--Hosted Cuban Dictator Fidel Castro for an Event Following Castro's Appearance at the U.N. - Complete with "Thunderous Applause," Chants of "Fidel! Fidel! Fidel!" and Cheers of "Viva Cuba!" name: Brittany Zurn
subject: My husband fell from a helicopter
body:
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZKLD8VgaNFemGmWbcgl5ml2VDLIvpccYu4oHtphNI2PaddyIwbWCC2vHHqxXFZfG34uHUJIW00HsofSO957H0lVW0bzw8UEJ5WLpgu3AeQbR2D0M6DaMGOuRIH_3FUj1wsLsMe77awPMzUXhScfUoKnaTqnmVZyTTXgV1ahUyvPWqOFxCaLsmMbl8JovfhXd2wVnPtaKQwmHBCmgLZB-Nq4Kny2uWNzbFeBr3DX4StDkrda_OohD1XpOLAtFR2NCOh_jjykBZTLyys_NTGZFQ==&c=MfP8oW5ug4lRwiMxjcmti-jt2Hzm5z8rAoqIu3Ss0WT3o10uE7aWBw==&ch=gnUfU7r053KbbLfLszaPvtgYi9fXoUc9DMUPlHaeAST2tPyH_YuAxA==) Fellow Patriot, **My husband fell from a helicopter. He survived, but the man I 'd loved over half my life was gone. **
My husband, U.S. Marine Corps SGT Aaron Zurn, suffered a traumatic brain injury that changed him forever.

I had known him since I was 11 years old and he was 13. We started dating in high school and the rest was history. He gave me 3 beautiful children that I stayed home to take care of while he fought for our country.
And just like that, our lives turned upside down. Aaron's injury severely and permanently damaged his brain, leaving him with the mental capacity of a 13 year old. So I became his full time caregiver and went back to school to become a teacher. It wasn't always easy. I didn't always know if or how we would make ends meet.

I didn't always know how I was going to pay Aaron's medical bills, put food on the table and keep a roof over our heads.

But I was never going to stop trying. I was never going to give up. Because the Aaron I married never would have either. [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZKLD8VgaNFemGmWbcgl5ml2VDLIvpccYu4oHtphNI2PaddyIwbWCC2vHHqxXFZfG34uHUJIW00HsofSO957H0lVW0bzw8UEJ5WLpgu3AeQbR2D0M6DaMGOuRIH_3FUj1wsLsMe77awPMzUXhScfUoKnaTqnmVZyTTXgV1ahUyvPWqOFxCaLsmMbl8JovfhXd2wVnPtaKQwmHBCmgLZB-Nq4Kny2uWNzbFeBr3DX4StDkrda_OohD1XpOLAtFR2NCOh_jjykBZTLyys_NTGZFQ==&c=MfP8oW5ug4lRwiMxjcmti-jt2Hzm5z8rAoqIu3Ss0WT3o10uE7aWBw==&ch=gnUfU7r053KbbLfLszaPvtgYi9fXoUc9DMUPlHaeAST2tPyH_YuAxA==) And then, our lives changed forever again -- but this time, it was a blessing greater than I could have ever imagined.

**Operation FINALLY HOME surprised us with a mortgage free home, custom-built to accommodate Aaron 's injuries.** [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZKLD8VgaNFemGmWbcgl5ml2VDLIvpccYu4oHtphNI2PaddyIwbWCC2vHHqxXFZfG34uHUJIW00HsofSO957H0lVW0bzw8UEJ5WLpgu3AeQbR2D0M6DaMGOuRIH_3FUj1wsLsMe77awPMzUXhScfUoKnaTqnmVZyTTXgV1ahUyvPWqOFxCaLsmMbl8JovfhXd2wVnPtaKQwmHBCmgLZB-Nq4Kny2uWNzbFeBr3DX4StDkrda_OohD1XpOLAtFR2NCOh_jjykBZTLyys_NTGZFQ==&c=MfP8oW5ug4lRwiMxjcmti-jt2Hzm5z8rAoqIu3Ss0WT3o10uE7aWBw==&ch=gnUfU7r053KbbLfLszaPvtgYi9fXoUc9DMUPlHaeAST2tPyH_YuAxA==) That's from the day they told us the news.

I was so overwhelmed. You can see the joy on all of our faces.

**[And I want to tell you about another family like mine you can share this joy with today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZKLD8VgaNFemGmWbcgl5ml2VDLIvpccYu4oHtphNI2PaddyIwbWCC2vHHqxXFZfG34uHUJIW00HsofSO957H0lVW0bzw8UEJ5WLpgu3AeQbR2D0M6DaMGOuRIH_3FUj1wsLsMe77awPMzUXhScfUoKnaTqnmVZyTTXgV1ahUyvPWqOFxCaLsmMbl8JovfhXd2wVnPtaKQwmHBCmgLZB-Nq4Kny2uWNzbFeBr3DX4StDkrda_OohD1XpOLAtFR2NCOh_jjykBZTLyys_NTGZFQ==&c=MfP8oW5ug4lRwiMxjcmti-jt2Hzm5z8rAoqIu3Ss0WT3o10uE7aWBw==&ch=gnUfU7r053KbbLfLszaPvtgYi9fXoUc9DMUPlHaeAST2tPyH_YuAxA==)**

U.S. Army First Lieutenant Eric Benson was a fighter, just like my husband. In 2003, he came within 100 yards of losing his life to a vehicle explosion.

This wasn't a standard improvised explosive device (IED) -- it leveled an entire building.

As a result, Eric had a traumatic brain injury and other medical complications that put him in a wheelchair.

Eric's wife Caira has become his full time caretaker, like I did for Aaron 10 years ago.

**[Today, I hope you'll find it in your heart to bless this family with a custom-built, mortgage free home to call their own.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZKLD8VgaNFemGmWbcgl5ml2VDLIvpccYu4oHtphNI2PaddyIwbWCC2vHHqxXFZfG34uHUJIW00HsofSO957H0lVW0bzw8UEJ5WLpgu3AeQbR2D0M6DaMGOuRIH_3FUj1wsLsMe77awPMzUXhScfUoKnaTqnmVZyTTXgV1ahUyvPWqOFxCaLsmMbl8JovfhXd2wVnPtaKQwmHBCmgLZB-Nq4Kny2uWNzbFeBr3DX4StDkrda_OohD1XpOLAtFR2NCOh_jjykBZTLyys_NTGZFQ==&c=MfP8oW5ug4lRwiMxjcmti-jt2Hzm5z8rAoqIu3Ss0WT3o10uE7aWBw==&ch=gnUfU7r053KbbLfLszaPvtgYi9fXoUc9DMUPlHaeAST2tPyH_YuAxA==)**
Because the Bensons didn't let their hardships let them lose sight of the bigger picture.

Their hardships have only made them that much more grateful to be alive, and drove them to devote their time and energy to serving their communities.

They've sacrificed so much for you and me.

**And through Operation FINALLY HOME, you can thank them with a gift they 'll never forget.**
Dan Wallrath, founded Operation FINALLY HOME 15 years ago to provide severely wounded, ill, or injured veterans and widows of the fallen with the #1 most impactful "Thank You" they could ever receive from the American people...

...specially adapted, mortgage-free homes to call their own.

Dan saw the plight of our veterans who came home from Iraq and Afghanistan with brain injuries, without limbs, with severe burns, and much more.

Often these brave warriors can't dress themselves, get up and down stairs on their own, or remember simple tasks -- never mind secure a job that can pay the rent and put food on the table for their families.

That's why Operation FINALLY HOME builds these miracle homes to accommodate each veteran's specific injuries to make everyday tasks easier. **[And that's why I hope you'll lend a helping hand to the Bensons today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZKLD8VgaNFemGmWbcgl5ml2VDLIvpccYu4oHtphNI2PaddyIwbWCC2vHHqxXFZfG34uHUJIW00HsofSO957H0lVW0bzw8UEJ5WLpgu3AeQbR2D0M6DaMGOuRIH_3FUj1wsLsMe77awPMzUXhScfUoKnaTqnmVZyTTXgV1ahUyvPWqOFxCaLsmMbl8JovfhXd2wVnPtaKQwmHBCmgLZB-Nq4Kny2uWNzbFeBr3DX4StDkrda_OohD1XpOLAtFR2NCOh_jjykBZTLyys_NTGZFQ==&c=MfP8oW5ug4lRwiMxjcmti-jt2Hzm5z8rAoqIu3Ss0WT3o10uE7aWBw==&ch=gnUfU7r053KbbLfLszaPvtgYi9fXoUc9DMUPlHaeAST2tPyH_YuAxA==)**
* If a veteran needs all the family bedrooms on the first floor so he or she can get to their toddler more quickly on their prosthetic legs - they give it to them.
* If a veteran who's lost his legs and arms - or both - needs a motorized lift to get in and out of the tub without the help of a spouse or parent - they do it.
* If a veteran needs a plain, dark room to retreat to when everyday sights and sounds trigger PTSD (Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder) episodes filled with the screams of their wounded platoon mates - they build it.

Whatever a veteran needs to live the rest of their lives as independently as possible, they provide it.
And they gift the home to the deserving family 100% mortgage-free so a severely wounded veteran never has to spend another anguished night worrying, "How will I ever take care of my family again?"

But Operation FINALLY HOME doesn't do this life-changing work alone.

#1. Dan's first step in providing a mortgage-free, specially adapted home for a severely wounded, ill, or injured veteran is to find a builder who's willing to donate his services free of charge.

#2. Then Dan turns to the local community for donations of the land and building materials.

#3. Then Dan finds a family to bless with this miracle. **[#4. And the final step in building this miracle home involves you.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZKLD8VgaNFemGmWbcgl5ml2VDLIvpccYu4oHtphNI2PaddyIwbWCC2vHHqxXFZfG34uHUJIW00HsofSO957H0lVW0bzw8UEJ5WLpgu3AeQbR2D0M6DaMGOuRIH_3FUj1wsLsMe77awPMzUXhScfUoKnaTqnmVZyTTXgV1ahUyvPWqOFxCaLsmMbl8JovfhXd2wVnPtaKQwmHBCmgLZB-Nq4Kny2uWNzbFeBr3DX4StDkrda_OohD1XpOLAtFR2NCOh_jjykBZTLyys_NTGZFQ==&c=MfP8oW5ug4lRwiMxjcmti-jt2Hzm5z8rAoqIu3Ss0WT3o10uE7aWBw==&ch=gnUfU7r053KbbLfLszaPvtgYi9fXoUc9DMUPlHaeAST2tPyH_YuAxA==)**

After finding patriots to donate the land and the bulk of the building materials, the Operation FINALLY HOME has to come up with $87,500 to finish building one home.

That certainly seems like a lot of money to me.

But Dan says he always knew that with God's help he'd be able to raise that $87,500 for each and every home. Why? Because Dan believed in the American people.

He knew if he could just find those patriots who wanted to help, they would respond like wildfire.

And that's why I'm writing to you today.

Dan and Operation FINALLY HOME have changed the lives of an amazing 225 wounded veterans and their families - including ours.

**[Will you help them build their next specially-adapted, mortgage-free home for Eric Benson and his family?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZKLD8VgaNFemGmWbcgl5ml2VDLIvpccYu4oHtphNI2PaddyIwbWCC2vHHqxXFZfG34uHUJIW00HsofSO957H0lVW0bzw8UEJ5WLpgu3AeQbR2D0M6DaMGOuRIH_3FUj1wsLsMe77awPMzUXhScfUoKnaTqnmVZyTTXgV1ahUyvPWqOFxCaLsmMbl8JovfhXd2wVnPtaKQwmHBCmgLZB-Nq4Kny2uWNzbFeBr3DX4StDkrda_OohD1XpOLAtFR2NCOh_jjykBZTLyys_NTGZFQ==&c=MfP8oW5ug4lRwiMxjcmti-jt2Hzm5z8rAoqIu3Ss0WT3o10uE7aWBw==&ch=gnUfU7r053KbbLfLszaPvtgYi9fXoUc9DMUPlHaeAST2tPyH_YuAxA==)**
Your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or whatever amount you feel is right...

...will give U.S. Army First Lieutenant Eric Benson a home where he can navigate his wheelchair easily, reach kitchen counters to help with dinner...

...allows Eric and Caira to rest easier knowing that their family will always have a roof over their heads...

...and maybe most importantly, your tax-deductible gift to build this home, tells Eric, Caira and their five children loud and clear that you care about their sacrifice.

And that means everything to veterans.

Thank you for your time, and may God bless you.
Sincerely,
Brittany Zurn [Help Build A Mortgage-Free Home For the Benson Family](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZKLD8VgaNFemGmWbcgl5ml2VDLIvpccYu4oHtphNI2PaddyIwbWCC2vHHqxXFZfG34uHUJIW00HsofSO957H0lVW0bzw8UEJ5WLpgu3AeQbR2D0M6DaMGOuRIH_3FUj1wsLsMe77awPMzUXhScfUoKnaTqnmVZyTTXgV1ahUyvPWqOFxCaLsmMbl8JovfhXd2wVnPtaKQwmHBCmgLZB-Nq4Kny2uWNzbFeBr3DX4StDkrda_OohD1XpOLAtFR2NCOh_jjykBZTLyys_NTGZFQ==&c=MfP8oW5ug4lRwiMxjcmti-jt2Hzm5z8rAoqIu3Ss0WT3o10uE7aWBw==&ch=gnUfU7r053KbbLfLszaPvtgYi9fXoUc9DMUPlHaeAST2tPyH_YuAxA==) [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZKLD8VgaNFemGmWbcgl5ml2VDLIvpccYu4oHtphNI2PaddyIwbWCC2vHHqxXFZfG34uHUJIW00HsofSO957H0lVW0bzw8UEJ5WLpgu3AeQbR2D0M6DaMGOuRIH_3FUj1wsLsMe77awPMzUXhScfUoKnaTqnmVZyTTXgV1ahUyvPWqOFxCaLsmMbl8JovfhXd2wVnPtaKQwmHBCmgLZB-Nq4Kny2uWNzbFeBr3DX4StDkrda_OohD1XpOLAtFR2NCOh_jjykBZTLyys_NTGZFQ==&c=MfP8oW5ug4lRwiMxjcmti-jt2Hzm5z8rAoqIu3Ss0WT3o10uE7aWBw==&ch=gnUfU7r053KbbLfLszaPvtgYi9fXoUc9DMUPlHaeAST2tPyH_YuAxA==) Operation FINALLY HOME is a nonpartisan/nonprofit 501(c)(3) organization.
All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. **[Support Operation FINALLY HOME today](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZKLD8VgaNFemGmWbcgl5ml2VDLIvpccYu4oHtphNI2PaddyIwbWCC2vHHqxXFZfG34uHUJIW00HsofSO957H0lVW0bzw8UEJ5WLpgu3AeQbR2D0M6DaMGOuRIH_3FUj1wsLsMe77awPMzUXhScfUoKnaTqnmVZyTTXgV1ahUyvPWqOFxCaLsmMbl8JovfhXd2wVnPtaKQwmHBCmgLZB-Nq4Kny2uWNzbFeBr3DX4StDkrda_OohD1XpOLAtFR2NCOh_jjykBZTLyys_NTGZFQ==&c=MfP8oW5ug4lRwiMxjcmti-jt2Hzm5z8rAoqIu3Ss0WT3o10uE7aWBw==&ch=gnUfU7r053KbbLfLszaPvtgYi9fXoUc9DMUPlHaeAST2tPyH_YuAxA==)** (C) Operation FINALLY HOME | [www.operationfinallyhome.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZKLD8VgaNFemGmWbcgl5ml2VDLIvpccYu4oHtphNI2PaddyIwbWCIt8CEwfe7m63auX_lgELI4-5Aga_inm8iLqs02ZGZ8iVQxyLA0fJEEa5XJ28btEUuZERSbUnGdhC-HljUFhuql6YUc8hvFt-9yq9G7I1cy_&c=MfP8oW5ug4lRwiMxjcmti-jt2Hzm5z8rAoqIu3Ss0WT3o10uE7aWBw==&ch=gnUfU7r053KbbLfLszaPvtgYi9fXoUc9DMUPlHaeAST2tPyH_YuAxA==)

We started dating in high school and the rest was history. He gave me 3 beautiful children that I stayed home to take care of while he fought for our country. And just like that, our lives turned upside down. Aaron's injury severely and permanently damaged his brain, leaving him with the mental capacity of a 13 year old. So I became his full time caregiver and went back to school to become a teacher. It wasn't always easy. I didn't always know if or how we would make ends meet. subject: Georgia run-off action plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WOMEN SPEAK OUT PAC
body:
Here's our plan for the run-off elections.
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014nrRfHjJVGKhtM5Momo4b895kY1KVQdma0Vn1-XWnHqYQORpaBojTdZT6ZF_y0kxUEXoT0g6DIu5gkDRTFMELRiZXinIGPQssYenfPVQk7mQL0GZdaqJjVYPitD1BpHfr30oq1qStmuG89tNqTaKYGE0WRtUun4w4MTHWFYpwMoKni5YIKDysdiPX5okb6vT7dPlh7DbLKzYKZwMjf8b0bqGuN6y3VKKjk24W_vW6hoeFoTBv_QFP7qybZjycMzWoiTqunXkhSO2Sz7SgcblvAcahhvGTHwNNdzFRa_pd_8=&c=UJv1QhgxhFi2ttsdP_UtdbYPxcKkBjaR3CBWWVgK-F22Yf8qoFry2g==&ch=oYo5Bgg4BSzEB7InjGlRiTSR99OFW4pDBDl1NFoU8H2reQqMIhR7Og==)
---
Friend,
---
It all comes down to Georgia.
---
The fate of our pro-life Senate majority hangs on the runoff elections of Georgia Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loefler on January 5, 2021.
---
These two races will determine whether there will be a check on the Biden-Harris Administration. We are on the doorstep of our worst-case scenario.
---
We are organizing a $4 million effort to ensure victory:
---

WSO PAC may accept unlimited contributions from any source, including individuals, political committees, and corporations, but may not accept contributions from federal contractors or foreign nationals (except individuals who are not citizens of the United States but who are lawfully admitted for permanent residence). Federal law requires WSO PAC to use its best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose contribution(s) exceed $200 in a calendar year. name: Mitch McConnell
subject: Internal Runoff Memo
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
I needed to reach out today to talk to you about the Georgia Runoff Elections and what that means for our Republican Senate Majority. Last week, despite being outraised and outspent by HUNDREDS of millions of dollars, Senate Republicans defended CRITICAL seats all across the country.

**FROM:** Mitch McConnell
**SUBJECT:** The Georgia Runoff Elections

Friend--

I needed to reach out today to talk to you about the Georgia Runoff Elections and what that means for our Republican Senate Majority.

Last week, despite being outraised and outspent by HUNDREDS of millions of dollars, Senate Republicans defended CRITICAL seats all across the country.

However, our fight isn't over yet. Control of the Senate is going to come down to two CRITICAL Georgia runoff elections, [_**and I 'm counting on your help to secure two victories.**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S3_Kj6O6AsEUoXFoQ8lKYy6H1At2-7OFqpJrmxe13nx9FTfJiO1z7u7ePQVy4fh3aXlPOzrLZx8ZtsUxeRrBdDuG50Q9R0_zP2wpyXkq-qJQvvf32VpAW4myECgwjPM1T1CiXQZfJ7yYpNrm4Fu6etq7-Q_rgUKR2eeTbAvhkJRP56s9higZnchfV5VGe-DeMqPptvHSgoMZgX5HONahz28P0zJ3Bu2g6Id7-o1eipgGS42t9r2NVRM5nul5FmZW_fslqQ_nUWYJiidfj-TsjAu8lNKPFyMts5lxSs_cEjVp2wwHWzSwMd-JgpMmhpjd7aK8--9LmVNX0mqM5URhkv7v1Ha0tH3h91H7klNRYUFPn0kUGuoTbFvKHN_e6JuT8W4di_U8sDM38tiICbRvcH4qrNqjXO6rJpM7dmZ2bGrZ6_eCVHp5Bw==&c=kel8vpcLLc0Em6jUGksUm3LiH565L_ISMhmRvw4agrk5FjPq7Sx8CA==&ch=94_e7yy6crNf41jqnuLgSxSrTnZ4WH_xv5SYdTY6WqpZbSrKnsyNEA==)

Democrats are going to continue to spend millions in order to attempt to buy this seat, [**which is why I need our nation 's TOP PATRIOTS to step up today so we can go toe to toe with Chuck Schumer and his liberal donors.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S3_Kj6O6AsEUoXFoQ8lKYy6H1At2-7OFqpJrmxe13nx9FTfJiO1z7u7ePQVy4fh3aXlPOzrLZx8ZtsUxeRrBdDuG50Q9R0_zP2wpyXkq-qJQvvf32VpAW4myECgwjPM1T1CiXQZfJ7yYpNrm4Fu6etq7-Q_rgUKR2eeTbAvhkJRP56s9higZnchfV5VGe-DeMqPptvHSgoMZgX5HONahz28P0zJ3Bu2g6Id7-o1eipgGS42t9r2NVRM5nul5FmZW_fslqQ_nUWYJiidfj-TsjAu8lNKPFyMts5lxSs_cEjVp2wwHWzSwMd-JgpMmhpjd7aK8--9LmVNX0mqM5URhkv7v1Ha0tH3h91H7klNRYUFPn0kUGuoTbFvKHN_e6JuT8W4di_U8sDM38tiICbRvcH4qrNqjXO6rJpM7dmZ2bGrZ6_eCVHp5Bw==&c=kel8vpcLLc0Em6jUGksUm3LiH565L_ISMhmRvw4agrk5FjPq7Sx8CA==&ch=94_e7yy6crNf41jqnuLgSxSrTnZ4WH_xv5SYdTY6WqpZbSrKnsyNEA==)

[**Will you be one of the key patriots to DEFEND our Republican Senate Majority?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S3_Kj6O6AsEUoXFoQ8lKYy6H1At2-7OFqpJrmxe13nx9FTfJiO1z7u7ePQVy4fh3aXlPOzrLZx8ZtsUxeRrBdDuG50Q9R0_zP2wpyXkq-qJQvvf32VpAW4myECgwjPM1T1CiXQZfJ7yYpNrm4Fu6etq7-Q_rgUKR2eeTbAvhkJRP56s9higZnchfV5VGe-DeMqPptvHSgoMZgX5HONahz28P0zJ3Bu2g6Id7-o1eipgGS42t9r2NVRM5nul5FmZW_fslqQ_nUWYJiidfj-TsjAu8lNKPFyMts5lxSs_cEjVp2wwHWzSwMd-JgpMmhpjd7aK8--9LmVNX0mqM5URhkv7v1Ha0tH3h91H7klNRYUFPn0kUGuoTbFvKHN_e6JuT8W4di_U8sDM38tiICbRvcH4qrNqjXO6rJpM7dmZ2bGrZ6_eCVHp5Bw==&c=kel8vpcLLc0Em6jUGksUm3LiH565L_ISMhmRvw4agrk5FjPq7Sx8CA==&ch=94_e7yy6crNf41jqnuLgSxSrTnZ4WH_xv5SYdTY6WqpZbSrKnsyNEA==)

With so much at stake, I knew I needed to make sure we had EVERY last resource at our fingertips, [**which is why I unlocked an additional 500% MATCH for our team 's top supporters.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S3_Kj6O6AsEUoXFoQ8lKYy6H1At2-7OFqpJrmxe13nx9FTfJiO1z7u7ePQVy4fh3aXlPOzrLZx8ZtsUxeRrBdDuG50Q9R0_zP2wpyXkq-qJQvvf32VpAW4myECgwjPM1T1CiXQZfJ7yYpNrm4Fu6etq7-Q_rgUKR2eeTbAvhkJRP56s9higZnchfV5VGe-DeMqPptvHSgoMZgX5HONahz28P0zJ3Bu2g6Id7-o1eipgGS42t9r2NVRM5nul5FmZW_fslqQ_nUWYJiidfj-TsjAu8lNKPFyMts5lxSs_cEjVp2wwHWzSwMd-JgpMmhpjd7aK8--9LmVNX0mqM5URhkv7v1Ha0tH3h91H7klNRYUFPn0kUGuoTbFvKHN_e6JuT8W4di_U8sDM38tiICbRvcH4qrNqjXO6rJpM7dmZ2bGrZ6_eCVHp5Bw==&c=kel8vpcLLc0Em6jUGksUm3LiH565L_ISMhmRvw4agrk5FjPq7Sx8CA==&ch=94_e7yy6crNf41jqnuLgSxSrTnZ4WH_xv5SYdTY6WqpZbSrKnsyNEA==)

The stakes have never been higher, Friend, and it's CRITICAL that you step up to help keep the Senate RED.

[**ALL grassroots contributions made will have 5X THE IMPACT in the fight for the Majority, Friend.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S3_Kj6O6AsEUoXFoQ8lKYy6H1At2-7OFqpJrmxe13nx9FTfJiO1z7u7ePQVy4fh3aXlPOzrLZx8ZtsUxeRrBdDuG50Q9R0_zP2wpyXkq-qJQvvf32VpAW4myECgwjPM1T1CiXQZfJ7yYpNrm4Fu6etq7-Q_rgUKR2eeTbAvhkJRP56s9higZnchfV5VGe-DeMqPptvHSgoMZgX5HONahz28P0zJ3Bu2g6Id7-o1eipgGS42t9r2NVRM5nul5FmZW_fslqQ_nUWYJiidfj-TsjAu8lNKPFyMts5lxSs_cEjVp2wwHWzSwMd-JgpMmhpjd7aK8--9LmVNX0mqM5URhkv7v1Ha0tH3h91H7klNRYUFPn0kUGuoTbFvKHN_e6JuT8W4di_U8sDM38tiICbRvcH4qrNqjXO6rJpM7dmZ2bGrZ6_eCVHp5Bw==&c=kel8vpcLLc0Em6jUGksUm3LiH565L_ISMhmRvw4agrk5FjPq7Sx8CA==&ch=94_e7yy6crNf41jqnuLgSxSrTnZ4WH_xv5SYdTY6WqpZbSrKnsyNEA==)

Please don't let us down when so much is at risk. If we're going to keep Georgia AND the Senate RED, [**we need you to rush a 500% matched contribution ASAP >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S3_Kj6O6AsEUoXFoQ8lKYy6H1At2-7OFqpJrmxe13nx9FTfJiO1z7u7ePQVy4fh3aXlPOzrLZx8ZtsUxeRrBdDuG50Q9R0_zP2wpyXkq-qJQvvf32VpAW4myECgwjPM1T1CiXQZfJ7yYpNrm4Fu6etq7-Q_rgUKR2eeTbAvhkJRP56s9higZnchfV5VGe-DeMqPptvHSgoMZgX5HONahz28P0zJ3Bu2g6Id7-o1eipgGS42t9r2NVRM5nul5FmZW_fslqQ_nUWYJiidfj-TsjAu8lNKPFyMts5lxSs_cEjVp2wwHWzSwMd-JgpMmhpjd7aK8--9LmVNX0mqM5URhkv7v1Ha0tH3h91H7klNRYUFPn0kUGuoTbFvKHN_e6JuT8W4di_U8sDM38tiICbRvcH4qrNqjXO6rJpM7dmZ2bGrZ6_eCVHp5Bw==&c=kel8vpcLLc0Em6jUGksUm3LiH565L_ISMhmRvw4agrk5FjPq7Sx8CA==&ch=94_e7yy6crNf41jqnuLgSxSrTnZ4WH_xv5SYdTY6WqpZbSrKnsyNEA==)

Thank you,

Mitch McConnell

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Thank you from Amanda Makki
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b25fca14737c/thank-you-from-amanda-makki?e=c2296cffff)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

I want to take this moment to **thank you** for your contributions, both personally and financially, that helped me in my campaign for Florida’s 13th Congressional District. Although we did not have the opportunity to demonstrate how we could defeat Charlie Crist, **I am proud of the campaign we ran, the team we put together, and for the friendships and loyal supporters like yourself who helped to _complete_ Team Makki!**

Many of you have asked what I'm doing and what the future holds for me. I believe that as a lifelong Republican, former Capitol Hill lawyer and a veteran of many federal campaigns, I can best use my legal and political skills in**key battleground states** to ensure that our presidential election was **free and fair and that when votes are certified by December 8th, that every legal vote was counted!**

**I will also work to ensure the Senate remains under Republican control with the two Georgia Senate races**, while helping to take back the House of Representatives by discussing the Democrats’ failed progressive policies that Speaker Pelosi and the Squad will surely pursue.

As an immigrant who has lived the American Dream. I have spent the last month as a Republican lawyer and commentator on the BBC, CNBC International, Newsmax, Sky News and Fox Business discussing the elections and legal issues being persued by the Trump campaign.

**Today I had a very ‘heated’ but spirited 13 minute interview with Sky News’ Adam Boulton who very much showed his political stripes! I discuss how Republicans overperformed, particularly in Florida but also nationally, and why we after only five days, we must be patient and allow for the integrity of every vote to count. I’d encourage you to watch it and feel free to send me your thoughts!**
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=d9582622ad&e=c2296cffff)
---
Adam Boulton's angry anti-Trump rant on Sky News - 9th Nov 2020
| Again, thank you for your support over the last year and for believing in my ability to make a difference. Please feel free to follow me on **Facebook: Amanda Makki for Congress** and on **Twitter: @amandamakki.**

All my best,

Amanda Makki
PO Box 47483
St. Petersburg, FL 33743
amanda@amandamakki.com
---
| | | | | | | [](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=de9181ed22&e=c2296cffff)

name: Georgia Blue Project
subject: Here in Georgia, the job’s not finished.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/21381589/260643214/-293505166?refcode=em11102020-PM-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNzM0ZmE3LTgwMjMtZWIxMS05ZmI0LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mUZdRmi3riHq7amkRAG3um8na-p13CbHA9mSbpwxi54=)
Friend—
When we started the Georgia Blue Project, our goal was to build a digital infrastructure to support down-ballot state legislative races in the 2020 election. We recognized that Georgia, with not one but two U.S. Senate elections, a new House and legislative battleground, and incredibly tight presidential margins, was the new political epicenter of the country. And we acted like it.
We believed that with strong candidates running energized campaigns for the State House and State Senate, we could close margins and impact races at the Congressional level, in the Senate, and ultimately, the White House.
Our focus: Turning out Black and Brown communities, young voters, and women who the Democratic Party has relied on to deliver key victories and lead our country forward. We took your donations and used them to advertise our endorsed candidates, producing videos and digital ads to reach and persuade voters not just in Atlanta, but across the entire state, often in the rural communities that are often overlooked.
Well, just a few thousand votes made the difference — _and Georgia delivered_.
We won the White House. The Georgia Blue Project's endorsed candidates **Nikki Merritt **(State Senate District 9), **Shea Roberts**(State House District 52), **Rebecca Mitchell**(State House District 106), and **Regina Lewis-Ward** (State House District 109) flipped seats that remained red even in the blue wave of the 2018 midterms.
**We defended Rep. Lucy McBath in the 6th congressional district and helped push Carolyn Bourdeaux across the finish line in the 7th — both districts that voted by more than 60% for Republicans in 2016.**
Together we held off Republican efforts in Atlanta and Savannah to disenfranchise voters, and the result was a historic voter turnout that turned Georgia blue for the first time since 1992.
Georgians showed up after losing Civil Rights leaders John Lewis, C.T. Vivian, and Joseph E. Lowery. After losing Ahmaud Arbery and Rayshard Brooks. After losing so many of our friends and family members to a virus that continues to ravage predominantly Black and Brown communities unchecked.
We honored their legacy by choosing the politics of hope, compassion, and empathy — while rejecting the divisiveness of the past four years. But our job isn't finished.
**We are pivoting aggressively to supporting Democratic candidates Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff in their January 5th runoff elections against Republican Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue.**
With an expected 50-48 Republican margin heading into these contests, a Democratic sweep could break Mitch McConnell's majority and give the tie breaking vote to Vice President-elect Kamala Harris, which is crucial to executing a Democratic legislative agenda on issues like $15 minimum wage, restoring the Voting Rights Act, and expanding the Affordable Care Act.
Absentee ballots will be mailed **as early as November 18**. We have a **December 7 voter registration deadline** with **in-person early voting beginning December 14**.
[_**We need to begin an aggressive 159-county digital campaign to win these elections and cannot let this opportunity go to waste. Will you donate $40 — $20 for each Senate race — to the Georgia Blue Project today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/21381590/260643215/-1328876110?refcode=em11102020-PM-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNzM0ZmE3LTgwMjMtZWIxMS05ZmI0LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mUZdRmi3riHq7amkRAG3um8na-p13CbHA9mSbpwxi54=)

clean_body: = Friend— When we started the Georgia Blue Project, our goal was to build a digital infrastructure to support down-ballot state legislative races in the 2020 election. We recognized that Georgia, with not one but two U.S. Senate elections, a new House and legislative battleground, and incredibly tight presidential margins, was the new political epicenter of the country. And we acted like it. We believed that with strong candidates running energized campaigns for the State House and State Senate, we could close margins and impact races at the Congressional level, in the Senate, and ultimately, the White House. Our focus: Turning out Black and Brown communities, young voters, and women who the Democratic Party has relied on to deliver key victories and lead our country forward. We took your donations and used them to advertise our endorsed candidates, producing videos and digital ads to reach and persuade voters not just in Atlanta, but across the entire state, often in the rural communities that are often overlooked. Well, just a few thousand votes made the difference — and Georgia delivered. We won the White House. The Georgia Blue Project's endorsed candidates Nikki Merritt (State Senate District 9), Shea Roberts(State House District 52), Rebecca Mitchell(State House District 106), and Regina Lewis-Ward (State House District 109) flipped seats that remained red even in the blue wave of the 2018 midterms. We defended Rep. Lucy McBath in the 6th congressional district and helped push Carolyn Bourdeaux across the finish line in the 7th — both districts that voted by more than 60% for Republicans in 2016. Together we held off Republican efforts in Atlanta and Savannah to disenfranchise voters, and the result was a historic voter turnout that turned Georgia blue for the first time since 1992. Georgians showed up after losing Civil Rights leaders John Lewis, C.T. Vivian, and Joseph E. Lowery. After losing Ahmaud Arbery and Rayshard Brooks. After losing so many of our friends and family members to a virus that continues to ravage predominantly Black and Brown communities unchecked. We honored their legacy by choosing the politics of hope, compassion, and empathy — while rejecting the divisiveness of the past four years. But our job isn't finished. We are pivoting aggressively to supporting Democratic candidates Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff in their January 5th runoff elections against Republican Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue. With an expected 50-48 Republican margin heading into these contests, a Democratic sweep could break Mitch McConnell's majority and give the tie breaking vote to Vice President-elect Kamala Harris, which is crucial to executing a Democratic legislative agenda on issues like $15 minimum wage, restoring the Voting Rights Act, and expanding the Affordable Care Act. Absentee ballots will be mailed as early as November 18. We have a December 7 voter registration deadline with in-person early voting beginning December 14. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = =_ We have the ability to shape history and make sure that the Biden-Harris administration can make meaningful change alongside two senators who are signed, sealed, delivered and approved by the people of Georgia and its diverse communities. —Team GBP * Paid for by GBP, www.georgiablueproject.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
| | Peter, In the race for the White House, there’s still a lot we don’t know. As the legal battle plays out, My Faith Votes will stand on the side of transparency, the rule of law, and ensuring that every LEGAL ballot is counted. **That said, I can tell you one thing with certainty -- the future of the U.S. Senate now hinges upon two runoff elections in Georgia. Set for January 5, we’re less than two months out, and getting Christians to the polls for those vital races is now our #1 focus.** **[As we hone in on the fight for the U.S. Senate, please rush an emergency donation to My Faith Votes’ Georgia Runoff efforts right now.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201110apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201110apl01nd&n=1)** This is where we must focus, and I ask for your ongoing commitment and support today. body:
I know you are hearing conflicting information about the results of the Presidential election, but the Senate Majority is still undecided. Democrats are already flooding Georgia with millions of dollars and negative television ads to beat my Republican colleagues and FLIP the Senate BLUE.
Friend,

I know you are hearing conflicting information about the results of the Presidential election, but the Senate Majority is still undecided.

Here is one thing we know for certain: **two Senate runoff elections in Georgia will decide who controls the Senate Majority.**

_That 's right, our work is not done._

Democrats are already flooding Georgia with millions of dollars and negative television ads to beat my Republican colleagues and FLIP the Senate BLUE.

[**I am looking to activate 500 grassroots conservatives to stand with me and help us hold the Republican Senate Majority. Are you in, Friend?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/500-patriots-for-georgia/?utm_campaign=20201110_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040337-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201110_first-name-our-work-is-not-done)

Please, Friend, don't let me down.

Tim Scott

name: David Perdue
subject: Who is Jon Ossoff?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Perdue for Senate
body:
The stakes in this runoff election could not be higher, and today I want to introduce you to my radical opponent, Jon Ossoff.
Friend,

The stakes in this runoff election could not be higher, and today I want to introduce you to my radical opponent, Jon Ossoff.

Let's look at the facts:
* **He is nothing but a puppet of the Left.** Jon Ossoff is a 33-year old wannabe career politician with no real-world accomplishments. He is a vehicle for the extreme left to advance their toxic agenda.
* **He is incredibly radical.** He is supported by Communist Party U.S.A., has been endorsed by Bernie Sanders, and previously engaged in business with a media company partly owned by the Chinese Communist government and then tried to hide it from the people of Georgia.
* **He is an economic nightmare.** He opposed Republican tax cuts and instead supports a plan that will drastically raise taxes. He opposed the Paycheck Protection Program that saved 1.5 million Georgia jobs, even though his own father used a loan to save his company.
* **He supports the defund the police movement.** In an interview with WAOK, Ossoff said that "funding has to be on the line" for police departments- the very definition of defunding the police. He also refused to sign the pledge to support law enforcement.
* **He doesn 't actually care about Georgia.** He has offered Georgia's agricultural community NOTHING in terms of policy, assistance, or even attention. He supports a radical healthcare system. His public option means that 40+ rural Georgia hospitals could close.

clean_body: The stakes in this runoff election could not be higher, and today I want to introduce you to my radical opponent, Jon Ossoff. Friend, The stakes in this runoff election could not be higher, and today I want to introduce you to my radical opponent, Jon Ossoff. Let's look at the facts: He is nothing but a puppet of the Left. Jon Ossoff is a 33-year old wannabe career politician with no real-world accomplishments. He is a vehicle for the extreme left to advance their toxic agenda. He is incredibly radical. He is supported by Communist Party U.S.A., has been endorsed by Bernie Sanders, and previously engaged in business with a media company partly owned by the Chinese Communist government and then tried to hide it from the people of Georgia. He is an economic nightmare. He opposed Republican tax cuts and instead supports a plan that will drastically raise taxes. He opposed the Paycheck Protection Program that saved 1.5 million Georgia jobs, even though his own father used a loan to save his company. He supports the defund the police movement. In an interview with WAOK, Ossoff said that "funding has to be on the line" for police departments- the very definition of defunding the police. He also refused to sign the pledge to support law enforcement. He doesn 't actually care about Georgia. He has offered Georgia's agricultural community NOTHING in terms of policy, assistance, or even attention. He supports a radical healthcare system. His public option means that 40+ rural Georgia hospitals could close. == == == == == == ==** Thank you, David Perdue U.S. Senator for Georgia Paid for by Perdue for Senate | | Perdue for Senate | PO Box 12077, Atlanta, GA 30355 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

subject: Help me Congratulate Joe Biden and Kamala Harris! [Sign Our Card >>]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HJUYTlgDfc4B4bBWCvRxmLRt3n5ubHTqTQrclq2DTe4=/isCNWhydJ20gzkwAHiLzxu_YezBH9d9tqXbOTEXi5ZY=)
On Saturday, millions of Americans celebrated a long, hard-fought battle to retake the White House and set our country on a new trajectory.
Now, it's time we begin to heal our country -- but _first_ , I wanted to offer my heartfelt congratulations to the next President of the United States, Joe Biden, and our future _**Madam**_ Vice President, Kamala Harris.
[**Join me in saying _CONGRATULATIONS_ to _ _ Joe Biden and Kamala Harris for a race well run! | Sign Team Sanchez's card >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HJUYTlgDfc4B4bBWCvRxmLRt3n5ubHTqTQrclq2DTe4=/_5xTun1OsrhYxjEGNJ4NnJ7ZiWk4RgTSQRyafAZhtqo=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HJUYTlgDfc4B4bBWCvRxmLRt3n5ubHTqTQrclq2DTe4=/r5HRei6i_WjPP13lPdTw8rwo8DQnHxUtFIrgJEc_iGA=)
Campaigning is _hard -- _especially in a year like this when so much is on the line. I _know_ that Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are elated, exhausted, and ready to get to work for the American people.
For Joe and Kamala, however, this election is not the finish line. Instead, the real work starts **now**. With a _long_ road ahead of us, we need to celebrate victories as they come!
[**So, will you help us celebrate by signing our card of congratulations for President-elect Biden and Vice President-elect Harris?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HJUYTlgDfc4B4bBWCvRxmLRt3n5ubHTqTQrclq2DTe4=/_5xTun1OsrhYxjEGNJ4NnJ7ZiWk4RgTSQRyafAZhtqo=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HJUYTlgDfc4B4bBWCvRxmLRt3n5ubHTqTQrclq2DTe4=/r5HRei6i_WjPP13lPdTw8rwo8DQnHxUtFIrgJEc_iGA=)
Thank you!!
_\-- Linda S anchez_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HJUYTlgDfc4B4bBWCvRxmLRt3n5ubHTqTQrclq2DTe4=/Je7icR2hA63vF0FBjG0FNuxidfjNzBD11XyzH8sJFnc=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HJUYTlgDfc4B4bBWCvRxmLRt3n5ubHTqTQrclq2DTe4=/G1C_MU_t5VaEaPM_bvLX3dl8whasFeCqIHhcuQZa19s=)_ _

body:
Friend,

The votes are in and it has been decided- **Georgia will be holding runoffs in January.**

clean_body: We can’t stop fighting for fairness and transparency in the counting of absentee ballots until we know for sure that we won THE FIGHT FOR NY-22 ISN’T OVER Absentee ballots are still being counted across the district and we need your help to defend fairness and transparency in the counting of LEGAL ballots! Friend, It’s been a long week of counting ballots – but no winner has been announced yet and that means one thing: We can’t stop fighting for fairness and transparency in the counting of absentee ballots until we know for sure that we won. Believe it or not, thousands of ballots are still being delivered and tallied across the district, and we need your help to make sure that the voice of the people is heard loud and clear when everything is said and done. Friend, we knew at the start of this campaign that winning wouldn’t be easy. We knew that unimaginable challenges would come our way and that we would have to be ready to go the extra mile at all times in order to take back our district. This election week is no different, but the stakes are that much higher and we need all the help that we can get to make sure that every legal ballot is counted in a way that is open and honest. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. I can’t thank you enough for sticking with us every step of the way. body:
Help us fund Latino outreach in Georgia | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1dd348ee2a77/our-work-is-not-done?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| | Dear ,

Thank you.

Because of you, we defeated Donald Trump.

Latino voters broke records this election. According to data from Catalist, turnout among young Latinos increased by 300% and overall turnout during early vote increased by more than 30%.

However, our work is not done.

Two Republicans were forced into runoff elections in Georgia to determine which party controls the U.S. Senate. The Latino vote will be critical in winning these elections for the Democrats and ensuring that Vice President-elect Kamala Harris becomes the tie-breaking vote.

You helped us raise over $8 million ahead of the general election to do groundbreaking work to turn out Latinos and deliver Democratic victories in Arizona, Michigan, Nevada and Pennsylvania. We need your help to win the fight in Georgia.

[**Will you make a donation right now to help us reach our goal to fund Latino outreach in Georgia?**](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=4a888b27a8&e=b8f90417f9)

name: Young Kim
subject: Here’s where we stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
This margin is razor-thin and Pelosi has lined up an army of lawyers to challenge the results in court. We can't let the Democrats use their never-ending war chests to drag this battle out in court.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I7cW_padnchZg33MT4l_jNlyvIKil7IsnduBZkno4KQafpy_8-7OX9AoyWBUSLrcg-Buy6qoDqIoRpMBOw2uzg4RAwDpH_i-kGWFb8HvjHzhGmN1bRhRnxVNOZJo76pa-dUiIAW1YjStUi8IPm-20lqZXwOs1s8HCIDNrBk2RVtp-nMSlYhhEPMJU5EHyv8uxlkfDJxSySeryD14S6zaRcKsEWFqO0e6LEUccveRS-jsh25YPfHUyzok2GhQSDt6cGJfLZk4KFl-qjw3X3yQdn-_LXvJUXd_Yn1ZVfyA0hvIi8kjb5zgiO6LFbcCGPvZG89KyYE0t9gj3rB3K2WX3ZnuINWoSX8zv5GCGD__0ozTt4NyXuabPkzHU5WKGyk1Cm6-FBnP6sdd8MaFQxnj3QSUzjDbjsMTdEbNlL_CzkI=&c=2Do4DxrwM6LyCkkYUgBy2-YEFT2OtDw2PCbbzGLHvYLobbBnKmnY7g==&ch=rdayAt7tduRE_kEQc5309cPwM7hvsTIhX46_szN4dXoVt6FLtdSHSw==)
---
Friend, this is important. After last night's update, I'm winning by only 3,550 votes.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I7cW_padnchZg33MT4l_jNlyvIKil7IsnduBZkno4KQafpy_8-7OXzrtSSgg8iDGEVZnR9EO0L9PUc6jOYl9NcpzjrcH_SpRTjxtOENeFOsr09YjDQX0JBdVVkqa5cWkqJ60MAI1HhYo2YSge7jUXQ8-xic1beHl5snSvt0KenFSpoPkXBuG1enqfBES7k9XTTWSlLPGmYrkDBXECVeYbgrOtSCsKavy47oKSJWdu9LsyMUUUgIaw63N_NuJ-msTDpTVniz2lQmALN3Op9VJe9f13t38WLMV_nY20mvJOC9ZSlmQz4QvvEsv9kVFN3r-eG0SpAuMWZl5GwF9Pmu5lw3-qMm0gRWI6Z_dQkuDxQGO0w9ndm6ZBYfDY6qe_zs6HZ7Nssp3dlPmwIvqPZw6zjWqI_6NQ9FWuB98R_tyvcQ=&c=2Do4DxrwM6LyCkkYUgBy2-YEFT2OtDw2PCbbzGLHvYLobbBnKmnY7g==&ch=rdayAt7tduRE_kEQc5309cPwM7hvsTIhX46_szN4dXoVt6FLtdSHSw==)
This margin is razor-thin and Pelosi has lined up an army of lawyers to challenge the results in court. We can't let the Democrats use their never-ending war chests to drag this battle out in court.

And here's the bad news: getting to November 3rd took everything we had. We emptied our pockets to run the television ads people saw before heading to the polls and we zeroed our accounts to expand our GOTV efforts.

That's why I have to ask:[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I7cW_padnchZg33MT4l_jNlyvIKil7IsnduBZkno4KQafpy_8-7OXzrtSSgg8iDGEVZnR9EO0L9PUc6jOYl9NcpzjrcH_SpRTjxtOENeFOsr09YjDQX0JBdVVkqa5cWkqJ60MAI1HhYo2YSge7jUXQ8-xic1beHl5snSvt0KenFSpoPkXBuG1enqfBES7k9XTTWSlLPGmYrkDBXECVeYbgrOtSCsKavy47oKSJWdu9LsyMUUUgIaw63N_NuJ-msTDpTVniz2lQmALN3Op9VJe9f13t38WLMV_nY20mvJOC9ZSlmQz4QvvEsv9kVFN3r-eG0SpAuMWZl5GwF9Pmu5lw3-qMm0gRWI6Z_dQkuDxQGO0w9ndm6ZBYfDY6qe_zs6HZ7Nssp3dlPmwIvqPZw6zjWqI_6NQ9FWuB98R_tyvcQ=&c=2Do4DxrwM6LyCkkYUgBy2-YEFT2OtDw2PCbbzGLHvYLobbBnKmnY7g==&ch=rdayAt7tduRE_kEQc5309cPwM7hvsTIhX46_szN4dXoVt6FLtdSHSw==)**[Can you chip in to our Recount Fund to help us fight?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I7cW_padnchZg33MT4l_jNlyvIKil7IsnduBZkno4KQafpy_8-7OXzrtSSgg8iDGEVZnR9EO0L9PUc6jOYl9NcpzjrcH_SpRTjxtOENeFOsr09YjDQX0JBdVVkqa5cWkqJ60MAI1HhYo2YSge7jUXQ8-xic1beHl5snSvt0KenFSpoPkXBuG1enqfBES7k9XTTWSlLPGmYrkDBXECVeYbgrOtSCsKavy47oKSJWdu9LsyMUUUgIaw63N_NuJ-msTDpTVniz2lQmALN3Op9VJe9f13t38WLMV_nY20mvJOC9ZSlmQz4QvvEsv9kVFN3r-eG0SpAuMWZl5GwF9Pmu5lw3-qMm0gRWI6Z_dQkuDxQGO0w9ndm6ZBYfDY6qe_zs6HZ7Nssp3dlPmwIvqPZw6zjWqI_6NQ9FWuB98R_tyvcQ=&c=2Do4DxrwM6LyCkkYUgBy2-YEFT2OtDw2PCbbzGLHvYLobbBnKmnY7g==&ch=rdayAt7tduRE_kEQc5309cPwM7hvsTIhX46_szN4dXoVt6FLtdSHSw==) We are poised to win, but we can't quit now.**

We are officially 1 week past Election Day, and this race is still too close to call. We knew it would be close and we knew it would be tough, but it's shaping up to be one of the tightest in the nation.

We have a lot of work to do, Joe Won! Andy Harris is fully supporting Donald Trump for a Second Term, even though President Trump lost the Election a

# We have a lot of work to do, Joe Won!
---
Andy Harris is fully supporting Donald Trump for a Second Term, even though President Trump lost the Election and Popular Vote to President-Elect Joe Biden. A lot needs to get done for our Marylander's still, and we need your help to heal our great nation as proclaimed by Joe and Kamala. Trump needs to Concede. It's easy to do because I know I did last week when we lost to Andy. As we look toward 2022, please work with us to ensure our shores stay protected and our healthcare remains affordable. We will continue to strive to restore equity and equality for all in all the upcoming legislative sessions. We're asking you to join our group discussion this upcoming Monday at 7 pm Eastern Time for a Special Election Wrap Up. RSVP: [Click Here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=294350.1230.1.0979cc02674e93df882e1fc8b3ed0cac&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MDc3NjgyMC0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My0wMGM0MzMzYmI4YzIwN2ZmZDIyOWEzZWY1YWFlMjg5NzQxOWEyZmI4IiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjI5NDM1MCJ9)
---
---
**Warm Regards,** **Friends of Mia Mason**
---
---

ATLANTA - Today, the Georgians for Kelly Loeffler campaign released a new [ad](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tPoiFJUIaYNvEThFqthTLu6kDOedssaedlyWi07hjWGDahywQZ4bJZ7uGDW-KcRYSfgneyfecm-GHeH3i4XPMY9ojgvNceOBg89vKhc0e_jA7um0G52pMuCcIVtc4XEevAKCnScTn2f7hyWBky678Jm33_4jt5aD6Hm3Hoas_7Y6jSVxlWN2dY0HWtRXoElYPILQPQioypfVe8t0f9KnQg==&c=zN9RyTM2_DvWq1gEojUAbMuENJ41d0iaIZOlvo5QagUBQRqXhf_4Ig==&ch=h2EYXZ9Xb44zxMvkLaWhyI-OJSuHlJ_TImXVApD7iGU4d0kk112RIA==) exposing Raphael Warnock's long history of radical views. Jeremiah Wright's "God Damn America" Agenda, [calling](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tPoiFJUIaYNvEThFqthTLu6kDOedssaedlyWi07hjWGDahywQZ4bJZ7uGDW-KcRYTUYiONdrEUXRIbbNuWqQ8K2ZEnVUufD2bDPIbN9-htlAackyHSixRiknpKjD3GOSPIY3aUXd_26G7GJHq1clUBvlC8omNhBw8OeNOycAidh4nI5L2P6dSw==&c=zN9RyTM2_DvWq1gEojUAbMuENJ41d0iaIZOlvo5QagUBQRqXhf_4Ig==&ch=h2EYXZ9Xb44zxMvkLaWhyI-OJSuHlJ_TImXVApD7iGU4d0kk112RIA==) police officers "gangsters," "thugs," "bullies," and a "danger" to children, railing against [Israel](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tPoiFJUIaYNvEThFqthTLu6kDOedssaedlyWi07hjWGDahywQZ4bJbkIAY3Nh1OVXSxT6ADtaMM5wTfvfFZ3_z_rgd9GQRxVgyCQUwZ4gIm2NjthXYQ3wxlzYgBe1X_PdDU7VNWv2X3fBo0Qcnk0uIaWxPddAXYSPhFsjc4JnIp6Ej9q2YySt-j1AIEWv9yIyMw5vRlwpIM=&c=zN9RyTM2_DvWq1gEojUAbMuENJ41d0iaIZOlvo5QagUBQRqXhf_4Ig==&ch=h2EYXZ9Xb44zxMvkLaWhyI-OJSuHlJ_TImXVApD7iGU4d0kk112RIA==), and [celebrating](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tPoiFJUIaYNvEThFqthTLu6kDOedssaedlyWi07hjWGDahywQZ4bJaIz4aUnZ_PpSAhXKnB3oyLPU-yDl76gWnmAjeYDTlMwDDf561G2RChzOUIytqZZDZ0dFquBaHmqyd-nlhIRZoD5YMaeOSd5OUpsvgO8Dm2uePwjkLCrP4aoqO4nuld5KfJU8ti2FpPsbnjKGJ9wcbE=&c=zN9RyTM2_DvWq1gEojUAbMuENJ41d0iaIZOlvo5QagUBQRqXhf_4Ig==&ch=h2EYXZ9Xb44zxMvkLaWhyI-OJSuHlJ_TImXVApD7iGU4d0kk112RIA==) Marxists and socialists like Fidel Castro.
