name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Direct cash grants for bars and restaurants
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
This past weekend marked the beginning of new restrictions to curb the spread of COVID-19 in Rhode Island. One of the major changes we've made is an earlier closing time for all bars and restaurants - 10pm on weeknights, and 10:30pm on Fridays and Saturdays. We know that the more time we spend somewhere, the more likely we are to get the virus. And we also know that the current increase in cases is being driven by informal, social settings where our guards are down and our masks are off, and that's often happening at night. It's our hope that taking this step now will allow us to avoid a full shutdown of these businesses down the road.
We know this is difficult for restaurants and bars, who have already been struggling during this pandemic. So we've launched another grant program to provide assistance. Restaurants and bars need only to answer a few questions to verify their eligibility and will receive a grant between $2,000 and $10,000 within thirty days. The application can be found [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00130gholyfNRObn3yol7RgMIBeMSwHBzvndtAIcFzQZP2WI91Wvb1SNGqRoL4brtKB6M0_kOP3E255R7zG4ahJHDIQskJNK_sCuUvsR3MXn0n9OZPKvt79UlsUpCVjD6se8if5Ybtd_YXYfaRXGOz4YJE4aGihd3F4&c=GKbqYBZ4lTaOBaAweZpK7lrS9J2jQHJgVclLTgxvFzwRuwFzAuc5XA==&ch=J4keijaFXRKnQ2wZDkPWT1F0SLiDmUhmAXdeVA7vj3Red-NIFYG2VA==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00130gholyfNRObn3yol7RgMIBeMSwHBzvndtAIcFzQZP2WI91Wvb1SNM8oQJF0_1GHok2OAGWeP5ldXdSEskrMTE9pLA7p_B2Pwh6ztdJqP9ucCxBmqINHz_EiViQr7Ym8KRkcZqClO14F6gDRrMZjaMr_PL7cTPhj0v0IkP-1BkPe81um5gizZwRYaWqq55uc0RyRSPjUrJg=&c=GKbqYBZ4lTaOBaAweZpK7lrS9J2jQHJgVclLTgxvFzwRuwFzAuc5XA==&ch=J4keijaFXRKnQ2wZDkPWT1F0SLiDmUhmAXdeVA7vj3Red-NIFYG2VA==)
---
| Any bar and restaurant owners impacted by the early shutdowns that has an active Meals and Beverage account or liquor license with the RI Division of Taxation and has paid taxes for the months of July, August and September is eligible. If you meet those requirements, you should apply immediately through the [Division of Taxation's website](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00130gholyfNRObn3yol7RgMIBeMSwHBzvndtAIcFzQZP2WI91Wvb1SNGqRoL4brtKB6M0_kOP3E255R7zG4ahJHDIQskJNK_sCuUvsR3MXn0n9OZPKvt79UlsUpCVjD6se8if5Ybtd_YXYfaRXGOz4YJE4aGihd3F4&c=GKbqYBZ4lTaOBaAweZpK7lrS9J2jQHJgVclLTgxvFzwRuwFzAuc5XA==&ch=J4keijaFXRKnQ2wZDkPWT1F0SLiDmUhmAXdeVA7vj3Red-NIFYG2VA==). The deadline is December 15th.
If you have questions, please look at the helpful [FAQ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00130gholyfNRObn3yol7RgMIBeMSwHBzvndtAIcFzQZP2WI91Wvb1SNGqRoL4brtKBoXzyoU5EeAfM5WoTahhIHEXOaH4_4_N8SAZCFhTKHCu6QhwxX_ZACO-FGMrcyxm_JwL1QMLZM51RAqI6jWPpHLNumLRcZMk7nNIq3m2juLP2gYlGKyHkskiqK-Fi-NkdbghaUz7HQalzIUbU0wZRvoLI8QvaJxvXZbuFufKDTXc=&c=GKbqYBZ4lTaOBaAweZpK7lrS9J2jQHJgVclLTgxvFzwRuwFzAuc5XA==&ch=J4keijaFXRKnQ2wZDkPWT1F0SLiDmUhmAXdeVA7vj3Red-NIFYG2VA==) section that we've put together. And if you don't meet the requirements but still need help for your business, call (401) 521-HELP to learn about other programs that may be right for you.
Ensuring that our rich culinary culture can continue beyond this pandemic is deeply important. For those who can, please support local restaurants this holiday season. We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00130gholyfNRObn3yol7RgMIBeMSwHBzvndtAIcFzQZP2WI91Wvb1SNGqRoL4brtKBbi1O4sS7hm7iY01geULcehUZ48y-NDhoQcB8fm0LjqHXdTbWA8E7BZW_yR_KenmBfhxIlnVqdunJ_cRxUPeHbG2Ra7yMWuFNi0vVlBAYXddChHiOhq5SnRxaGSCEFZonhCWXGEdzwSFgs9b1RGVTAAFeCaTGgfqROGXyecGBJyEZrVs6aZaKBUvFB94eLHwAVizqjnrMdy5KUSlvVeIFaYTjHbti1-OPyyWK0Hh6mo8GhVlPXuTyzazcmF6PZdJUt496UvNt8yo=&c=GKbqYBZ4lTaOBaAweZpK7lrS9J2jQHJgVclLTgxvFzwRuwFzAuc5XA==&ch=J4keijaFXRKnQ2wZDkPWT1F0SLiDmUhmAXdeVA7vj3Red-NIFYG2VA==).

| |

| Friends,

First the good news -- Senator Gary Daniels won the recount in District 11. Welcome back Gary!

Our thanks to Secretary of State Bill Gardner and his staff for conducting the recount in the midst of spiking Covid 19 cases.

Now the bad news. Unfortunately Sen Dietsch has decided to proceed with a recount in District 9 despite the fact that her margin of losing was over 400 votes —-more than double the margin in Gary Daniels District 11.

Sen Dietsch’s desire to enact both an income tax and donor towns is so extreme that she is ignoring the science of Covid and needlessly risking the health and safety of the Secretary of State's dedicated staff.

We look forward to celebrating Denise Ricciardi’s victory over Jeanne Dietsch and her radical positions.

Lastly, we are extremely grateful for your help with mitigating the very costly recounts. We will continue to fight against the Democrat’s efforts to change the results of the election and bring an income tax or sales tax to New Hampshire. [>>> Contribute online to our Recount Defense Fund here
](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTUxNTA1Mzg2OTU0MDM2NjI2JmM9YjhqMSZlPTE5MjgmYj00NTEwNDk2MTUmZD1iNXAyYTFu.kQXDAZQP93ZDhtaaKZ-dvJNbU3QDQVBvZ2wwsZQZHlA) Thank you, NH Senate Republicans

name: True the Vote
subject: Dinesh D'Souza Releases "The TRUTH About Voter Fraud in America"
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=307A713A20A3074)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | MUST WATCH: Dinesh D’Souza Releases Extended Clip of ‘Trump Card’ Highlighting True the Vote’s Efforts to Expose Voter Fraud

---
| | Bestselling author and filmmaker Dinesh D’Souza today released an extended clip of the movie "Trump Card" featuring an exclusive interview with True the Vote Founder and President Catherine Engelbrecht.
In the clip titled ["The TRUTH About Voter Fraud in America,"](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=307A713A20A3083) Catherine discusses the different types of fraud including voter registrations of illegal aliens, universal mail-in voting, ballot harvesting, and the weaknesses in the system that allow election fraud and manipulation to continue.
---
| | [ ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=307A713A20A3084)
---
| | |
---
| | [ WATCH ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=307A713A20A3084)
---
| |
We launched [Validate the Vote](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=307A713A20A3087) to to ensure 2020 election returns reflect the principle of "One vote for one voter" and to repair our broken elections once and for all. The initiative also includes a whistleblower fund of over $1,000,000 available to support those who come forward with credible evidence of criminal malfeasance.

If you’ve witnessed election fraud, manipulation or illegal activity, let us know by filling out the [Election Integrity Report](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=307A713A20A3088) on our website or calling our hotline at 855-702-0702.

Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg and was one of the first Black women to graduate from the Virginia Military Institute. Jennifer then served as a public defender and foster mom. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her two terms as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth's most vulnerable communities. Jennifer is committed to creating a Virginia that works for everyone. Help her make Virginia's future better than its past.

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: I need your opinion: What issues are important in 2021?
body:
I need your opinion: What issues are important in 2021?
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/_5rvDqsjXA0k9UhWhiW_92J0TGe1F5rd8200uexAXVe-FKRjVrpgHXJoEddTvIWwJgKaw8XAbsekxVGo7YPStACal9Qo0N30YOMwi_8I-6fMWIEEOwUbiina1z9R93LJml9_Qsaxtuhg43-XJIxIkboLim4stPXWrudokV2WwnkYTHN90rvsCM3FSw14C8fjG9bMTa1FEYAe2nOAE25_qSO51GtCTGpP1wbxW2RTOJtL2tHwfeR7NIxBbFN09L8yzezKyMhXUQ)
---
| | | |
---
**I need your opinion: What issues are important in 2021?**
| |
---
| | Even though the 2020 presidential election is far from over, the 2020 presidential election behind us, it is time to begin thinking about state and local politics and what issues our legislature needs to address in 2021. This year has seen unprecedented events that began with the spread of the corona virus and President Trump issuing bans on folks traveling from China. While travel bans may have been unexpected they were nothing compared to the over-reach of government into our daily lives that came next. Conservatives who believe in limited government were surprised and appalled when federal, state and local governments declared some individuals “essential workers” and other “non-essential.” Who could have predicted that citizens would need a letter to travel to and from work as proof they had been deemed “essential” by the government. We were caught off-guard when government made the decision that big businesses like Walmart and Home Depot were essential but the locally owned hardware store, who sold the same products, was non-essential and therefore prohibited from opening. But, don't forget the most egregious transgression when government declared that gathering to worship God was illegal. Now almost an entire year has passed and we still have local and state politicians, we once considered conservative leaders, wielding unprecedented power and control over the daily lives of citizens. Our governor has maintained that a declaration of state emergency can last as long as he deems necessary and that he therefore has the power to determine how many people we can associate with at a time, what we can wear and even determine what medical procedures and surgeries are allowed. The year 2020 has also witnessed a shift in how our educational system works. We have learned that some education can take place remotely, that we don't need school semesters to last as long, and that parents, not teachers, are the most critical and unchanging element of a child's education. We have learned that some law enforcement leaders are strong enough to withstand political pressure and refuse to enforce unconstitutional mandates, while others (like some officers in Greenville and Byhalia, MS) will enforce anything they are told to enforce no matter how unconstitutional and wrong. My question to you is what lessons have you learned from the year 2020? What issues so you think must be fixed, and how do you think they can be addressed? Are there laws that you believe need to be changed? Do you have ideas on how best to make the changes? The year is almost behind us, it is time to learn from our mistakes and make changes in the laws that have been exposed as harmful to our liberty and freedom. **Please click the link below and complete the form letting me know what issues you want addressed by the legislature in 2021.** PS - I don't often bring religion directly into my political discussions. It generally makes me uncomfortable simply because so many politicians use God to promote themselves. But today I am asking you specifically to pray for our nation. I fear that we have reached a point where God is turning his back on our nation. History shows that nations can become so evil that God decides it's time for them to end. For the sake of our children and grand-children I hope you will beg God to give us more time, more opportunity to turn our nation around. At least half of our nation voted this month to continue killing unborn babies, they voted in support of people who refuse to condemn mobs who destroy other's property and believe its justifiable to kill people with whom they disagree. I am asking God to give me another opportunity and my promise to Him is that if he gives us more time I will work harder to turn our nation back to Him. Please join me in that prayer. ****
---

clean_body: I need your opinion: What issues are important in 2021? | | | | | | | | | I need your opinion: What issues are important in 2021? | | | | Even though the 2020 presidential election is far from over, the 2020 presidential election behind us, it is time to begin thinking about state and local politics and what issues our legislature needs to address in 2021. This year has seen unprecedented events that began with the spread of the corona virus and President Trump issuing bans on folks traveling from China. While travel bans may have been unexpected they were nothing compared to the over-reach of government into our daily lives that came next. Conservatives who believe in limited government were surprised and appalled when federal, state and local governments declared some individuals “essential workers” and other “non-essential.” Who could have predicted that citizens would need a letter to travel to and from work as proof they had been deemed “essential” by the government. We were caught off-guard when government made the decision that big businesses like Walmart and Home Depot were essential but the locally owned hardware store, who sold the same products, was non-essential and therefore prohibited from opening. But, don't forget the most egregious transgression when government declared that gathering to worship God was illegal. Now almost an entire year has passed and we still have local and state politicians, we once considered conservative leaders, wielding unprecedented power and control over the daily lives of citizens. Our governor has maintained that a declaration of state emergency can last as long as he deems necessary and that he therefore has the power to determine how many people we can associate with at a time, what we can wear and even determine what medical procedures and surgeries are allowed. The year 2020 has also witnessed a shift in how our educational system works. We have learned that some education can take place remotely, that we don't need school semesters to last as long, and that parents, not teachers, are the most critical and unchanging element of a child's education. We have learned that some law enforcement leaders are strong enough to withstand political pressure and refuse to enforce unconstitutional mandates, while others (like some officers in Greenville and Byhalia, MS) will enforce anything they are told to enforce no matter how unconstitutional and wrong. My question to you is what lessons have you learned from the year 2020? What issues so you think must be fixed, and how do you think they can be addressed? Are there laws that you believe need to be changed? Do you have ideas on how best to make the changes? The year is almost behind us, it is time to learn from our mistakes and make changes in the laws that have been exposed as harmful to our liberty and freedom. Please click the link below and complete the form letting me know what issues you want addressed by the legislature in 2021. PS - I don't often bring religion directly into my political discussions. It generally makes me uncomfortable simply because so many politicians use God to promote themselves. But today I am asking you specifically to pray for our nation. I fear that we have reached a point where God is turning his back on our nation. History shows that nations can become so evil that God decides it's time for them to end. For the sake of our children and grand-children I hope you will beg God to give us more time, more opportunity to turn our nation around. At least half of our nation voted this month to continue killing unborn babies, they voted in support of people who refuse to condemn mobs who destroy other's property and believe its justifiable to kill people with whom they disagree. I am asking God to give me another opportunity and my promise to Him is that if he gives us more time I will work harder to turn our nation back to Him. Please join me in that prayer. **** | | | | | | | | | | Friends for Dana Criswell PO Box 1321Olive Branch, MS 38654 Dana@DanaCriswell.net | | | | |

name: Kara Eastman
subject: Peter, I promised;
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eastman for Congress
body:
Peter, I'm reaching out to my most loyal supporters
|
---

| | [**_Peter, I 'm reaching out to my most loyal supporters with one final request. I just finished sorting through my campaign bills and I'm still $34,092 in the red. I wish I didn't have to ask, but I refuse to accept that only people with millions in the bank should run for office. Can you chip in to help me quickly pay off this campaign debt?_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8dd/77d4c309/22371d61/26358b63/2229759253/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201110_em_fr_b1_kara_ia&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

Let me explain, Peter:

I know we didn't get the result we wanted, but I'm so very proud of the campaign we ran. One that never sold out and came within inches of winning powered by grassroots donors.

I never liked asking you for money.

I hated that to unseat an entrenched GOP Republican like Don Bacon would take millions of dollars.

And I've learned first hand why it is hard for regular people to run for office: Taking on campaign debt is expected and almost always necessary to win.

[**I 'm not going to lie, this system is messed up. And I look forward to continuing to fight so people like you and me can run for office without the fear of financial ruin. But now I'm humbly asking: _Will you chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to help me pay off my final debt? >>_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8dd/77d4c309/22371d61/26358b63/2229759253/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201110_em_fr_b1_kara_ia&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

Peter, when I first announced I was running to unseat Don Bacon, I promised I would fight for hard working folks like you and me.

Because I understand what it's like to live paycheck to paycheck, unlike most of our elected officials.

I knew that, unlike many wealthy candidates, I had no financial safety net to fuel my campaign with.

I knew I wouldn't accept a cent of corporate PAC money because politicians in Washington have been bought and sold for far too long.

[**I refuse to have regrets for running this campaign the right way. And I nearly unseated Bacon because grassroots donors like you believed in me, and chipped in to support what I was fighting for.**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8dd/77d4c309/22371d61/26358b63/2229759253/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201110_em_fr_b1_kara_ia&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") [**_Even a couple of dollars will go a long way towards helping my family and I pay off this debt and help prove that people like me have just as much of a right to run for office. Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8dd/77d4c309/22371d61/26358b6b/2229759253/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8dd/77d4c309/22371d61/26358b6a/2229759253/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8dd/77d4c309/22371d61/26358b15/2229759253/VEsHAw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

| | Paid for by Eastman for Congress

clean_body: Peter, I'm reaching out to my most loyal supporters | | | "" Let me explain, Peter: I know we didn't get the result we wanted, but I'm so very proud of the campaign we ran. One that never sold out and came within inches of winning powered by grassroots donors. I never liked asking you for money. I hated that to unseat an entrenched GOP Republican like Don Bacon would take millions of dollars. And I've learned first hand why it is hard for regular people to run for office: Taking on campaign debt is expected and almost always necessary to win. "" Peter, when I first announced I was running to unseat Don Bacon, I promised I would fight for hard working folks like you and me. Because I understand what it's like to live paycheck to paycheck, unlike most of our elected officials. I knew that, unlike many wealthy candidates, I had no financial safety net to fuel my campaign with. I knew I wouldn't accept a cent of corporate PAC money because politicians in Washington have been bought and sold for far too long. "" "" | | "" "" "" "" "" "" As always -- thank you, Kara | "" "" "" Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines. name: Jay Inslee
subject: America as it should be
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Joe Biden and Kamala Harris made history.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8222%2E868730%2ESzUQfw) Friend, The American people have spoken. Congratulations to President-elect Joe Biden and Vice President-elect Kamala Harris on their decisive and inspiring victory. America's future under their leadership makes me extremely optimistic for our future. **[I hope you'll join me in congratulating them by sharing my post on Facebook celebrating their historic win.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13791?t=4&akid=8222%2E868730%2ESzUQfw)** | [SHARE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13791?t=5&akid=8222%2E868730%2ESzUQfw)
---
Make no mistake. Their victory is a mandate for action. And I look forward to leading Washington state as a partner in realizing their bold agenda.
The Biden-Harris administration will respect the rights of each and every American and restore integrity and empathy to our country.
I know Joe Biden will bring thoughtful and compassionate leadership to the White House. Vice President-elect Harris brings sorely needed qualification and integrity to the office. She will be the first woman -- and the first person of color -- to ever serve in her office, where she will reach millions of Americans who have been disparaged and even villainized by the Trump administration.
Again, congratulations to President-elect Joe Biden and Vice President-elect Kamala Harris for their hard-won victory. I know they will serve all Americans -- from those who voted for them to those who did not. **This is America as it should be.**
**[If you agree, send them both congratulations by sharing my Facebook post right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13791?t=6&akid=8222%2E868730%2ESzUQfw)**
Now it's time to get to work.
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13792?t=7&akid=8222%2E868730%2ESzUQfw)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=8222%2E868730%2ESzUQfw). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---
All content (C) 2020 JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D), All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/3?t=2&akid=8222%2E868730%2ESzUQfw)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Walz Targets YOUR Home
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_targets_your_ho&n=1)
---
Peter \-- It's official. Tyrant-in-the-Making Tim Walz just announced his new lockdown, exercising "emergency powers" he does not have. Despite what you hear from the media, this lockdown is just as bad and just as painful. **This time Walz is targeting YOUR home! And that's just in time for Thanksgiving celebrations with family.** KSTP reports: "The governor will limit gatherings to a maximum of 10 people, regardless of whether the gathering is indoors or outdoors. Those gatherings will also be limited to people from a maximum of three households." Are you kidding me? Even if a family wants to brave the weather and host Thanksgiving in their backyard, our overlord Timmy does not approve that behavior for his subjects. Well, I for one do not obey Tyrants. Most of you don't know this, but I served our country for 12 years in the Army; two of those years overseas. My service was not so the American people could live under the rule of ONE PERSON! In fact the oath of office I took to the Constitution suggests the exact opposite. Do you feel like we are LOSING our Republic?! **The Team at Action 4 Liberty is committed to Ending Walz' Emergency Powers because, like you, we also have a lot at stake. We have children in schools, business being impacted by the lockdown and we all value our liberty so much!** Democrats need to pay attention to what just happened last Tuesday. We needed to take out four bad voting Democrats and we accomplished it. In the case of politician Brad Tabke, we replaced him with a liberty champion named Erik Mortensen. We're coming out of this election with more power, more influence and more energy! So when the Legislature meets on Thursday to decide if they will end Walz' Emergency Powers again, we will be right back there defending YOUR liberty and Minnesota businesses. Walz' Assault on YOUR home and YOUR Thanksgiving plans can be killed on **Thursday by the Legislature**. Let's not wait until the new legislators take office in January, let's kick in the door and demand a "YES" vote now on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers! **The best way to help in this fight is to donate to our marketing budget. We must get the message out to more Minnesotans who are feeling the pain from the new lockdown. Help us harness their frustration and guide it to the right targets in St Paul.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_targets_your_ho&n=2 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_targets_your_ho&n=3)
---
If we want to be successful in Ending Walz' Emergency Powers, and I think we can be, we MUST build our movement even larger. Walz' new lockdown will hurt hundreds of thousands of new Minnesotans directly. We MUST find them and guide them where to funnel that frustration.
**You've been there for us when we asked you to contact legislators. And that work led to five Democrats joining us (think how hard that was to accomplish!).**
Help us get our message to more Minnesotans so our voice grows. NOW is the time to grow. The pain is real! Hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans NEED to hear our message of liberty NOW. Please help us get our voice to them.
## [Yes, I want to Grow Our Voice!](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_targets_your_ho&n=4)
Thank you in advance for your contribution.
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**P.S.****[Please help us expand our voice. Pitch in $100 if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or for max pain, donate $1,000.](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_targets_your_ho&n=5)**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_targets_your_ho&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_targets_your_ho&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_targets_your_ho&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: All eyes on Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
|

| | I'm in the fight of my life against unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) to flip Georgia's Senate seat blue. And according to _The Washington Post,_ what happens here could determine whether Democrats are able to secure Senate control and enact our bold agenda. I urgently need your help to win this race - but before I ask you to chip in, I need to give you an update on why your support is so important.

**[Right now, our momentum is unbelievable:](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd27/18e32a7f/4b930869/7b206675/2733573277/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saph_brl_email_warnock?refcode=20201107_em_fr_b1_warnock_ia&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180&express_lane=true")** After starting this campaign trailing our GOP opponent, our people-powered movement _surged_ into first place - something pundits said was impossible just a few months ago. Now, we've forced a head-to-head runoff election with Kelly Loeffler on Jan. 5 - and experts from Nate Silver to NBC News say we can really win this thing.**[In other words: We're within striking distance of defeating the Republicans and making history.](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd27/18e32a7f/4b930869/7b206675/2733573277/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saph_brl_email_warnock?refcode=20201107_em_fr_b1_warnock_ia&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180&express_lane=true")**

**[Here's the bad news:](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd27/18e32a7f/4b930869/7b20666a/2733573277/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saph_brl_email_warnock?refcode=20201107_em_fr_b1_warnock_90&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180&express_lane=true")** With all eyes on Georgia, Loeffler is spending over $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to defeat me, and the GOP is funneling in millions more to buy this seat for Mitch McConnell and block the Democratic agenda. Experts say this could be the most expensive race in history.

**[I don't take a dime from corporate PACs- I never have and I never will. But with Republicans spending MILLIONS to defeat me and keep this seat red, I need an immediate surge of grassroots support to win.](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd27/18e32a7f/4b930869/7b206675/2733573277/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saph_brl_email_warnock?refcode=20201107_em_fr_b1_warnock_ia&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180&express_lane=true")** [_So please, will you give $10 or more right now to defeat the GOP and flip this Georgia seat blue? >>_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd27/18e32a7f/4b930869/7b206675/2733573277/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saph_brl_email_warnock?refcode=20201107_em_fr_b1_warnock_ia&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180&express_lane=true")

There's far more than a Senate seat on the line in this race. My opponent is a far-right Trump loyalist who has run a campaign of divisiveness and bigotry. Meanwhile, I'm a pastor who's devoted my life to service - and in January, I could become Georgia's first-ever Black senator. With health care and the future of the Supreme Court on the line, we simply can't afford to send another Trump Republican to Washington.

My campaign set a goal to raise another $25,000 by midnight to defeat Kelly Loeffler - and in a race this close, falling short just isn't an option. But unfortunately, our campaign is not on track to raise what we need to win - which could mean we have to take our ads off the air and cut back our voter protection efforts.

**[We can _only_ win Georgia and secure Senate control for Democrats with immediate support from folks like you. So please, I'm personally asking because the stakes are so incredibly high:](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd27/18e32a7f/4b930869/7b206675/2733573277/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saph_brl_email_warnock?refcode=20201107_em_fr_b1_warnock_ia&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180&express_lane=true")** [_Will you give $10 or more today to help us win in Georgia, defeat the GOP and secure a Democratic Senate majority? >>_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd27/18e32a7f/4b930869/7b206675/2733573277/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saph_brl_email_warnock?refcode=20201107_em_fr_b1_warnock_ia&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180&express_lane=true")

| ****[**Rush $10 now >> **](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd27/18e32a7f/4b930869/7b206675/2733573277/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saph_brl_email_warnock?refcode=20201107_em_fr_b1_warnock_ia&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180&express_lane=true")****

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd27/18e32a7f/4b930869/7b206662/2733573277/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/peopleforben?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=auto")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd27/18e32a7f/4b930869/7b206663/2733573277/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd27/18e32a7f/4b930869/7b206660/2733573277/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd27/18e32a7f/4b930869/7b20666c/2733573277/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click the button below to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. **[UNSUBSCRIBE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd27/18e32a7f/4b930869/7b206661/2733573277/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")**

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

Friend,

The Democrats know that the only way they can win this Election is to undermine the system.

We’ve seen it from Day ONE:
- We’ve found ballots in drainage ditches
- They’re not letting our poll watchers inside
- There are videos of them passing out collateral material in polling sites all over PhiladelphiaIt is my belief that they will try to MANIPULATE THIS ELECTION, which is why I’m reaching out to you today.

We need to hold the line, and to do that, we need the resources to FIGHT BACK. My father wants YOU to contribute to our Official Election Defense Fund so that we can protect the integrity of our Election and win FOUR MORE YEARS.

When it comes to such a CRITICAL fight, every minute matters. That’s why if you step up in the NEXT HOUR, your contribution will make 1000% more of an impact.

This election week is no different, but the stakes are that much higher and we need all the help that we can get to make sure that every legal ballot is counted in a way that is open and honest. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. I can’t thank you enough for sticking with us every step of the way. Thank you, Claudia Tenney | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | PO Box 244 Clinton, NY 13323 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. A couple may contribute $5,600, designated per person in accordance with the preceding sentence. Federal multi-candidate PACs may contribute $5,000 for the recount. Peter,
The fight continues in Georgia, as we continue our effort to save our Senate majority from radical liberals and their socialist policies.

**If we lose these two Senate seats, Democrats will control the laws that govern our lives! **

_We are two seats away_ from our courts being packed, our police being defunded, and a sweeping government takeover of our daily lives. **Please join us in our fight to hold the Senate!**

70% of Republicans don’t believe the 2020 election was free and fair. **But the media decided they had seen enough and declared Joe Biden the winner.**

This is a major cause of concern that we are still fighting. If we lose these battles, liberals will continue to chip away at our democracy and our freedoms — it will affect future generations of Americans.

Josh Hawley

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: The next phase of the climate movement >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
The most exciting work is ahead of us.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=4336%2E53494%2Esns_14) Friend, Joe Biden will be the next president of the United States. This is a victory not just for him and the Democratic Party but for everyone who calls this planet home. Joe Biden ran with climate change front and center in his campaign. He brought it up in each debate, even when the moderators hadn't yet made it a focal point. He ran climate-focused ads in pivotal states like Michigan and Arizona. His ambitious climate plan was a central part of his campaign until the very end, making climate action a part of his closing pitch to voters. And he won. Now, it's time to act. Joe Biden has a clear mandate to make bold climate action a reality, starting on Day One of his term -- and Evergreen Action is committed to helping his administration realize that vision. **We've been pushing to put bold climate action to the top of America's agenda. Now, with Joe Biden headed to the White House, the real work begins to make it a reality.[Can you donate today to keep the momentum going for President-elect Biden to prioritize bold climate action?](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1171?t=3&akid=4336%2E53494%2Esns_14)** Years from now, Americans might be tempted to look back and think that Joe Biden's victory over Trump was inevitable. But it wasn't. All over the country, people worked together, day after day -- even amid a pandemic -- to build a coalition in support of bold climate action. The country and the climate are at an inflection point, and Evergreen will make sure we build a thriving and just clean energy future. We hope you're committed to that, too. As we turn our attention to what's next -- pushing the administration to use the powers of the presidency to take bold action on climate -- we won't forget the incredible feeling that comes when activism leads to real change for the country. **[Are you as fired up as we are? Donate to Evergreen today to help us push for an all-out mobilization of the federal government to defeat the climate crisis -- because the most exciting work lies ahead.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1171?t=4&akid=4336%2E53494%2Esns_14)** Thank you, Jamal Raad
